name: American Action News
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfbn78lhp3cm3ghgr12lcd2d00vlbutadtflbqm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdg6eor4chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkkhk0b8atm2u813n2jiile5000svv41jl7144i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdg6eor4chh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkekaqs3d6jtrjrgsupbj9kg7sfr00qqt9nu89gg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdg6eor4chh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation’s youth. And it’s no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5kprs7u95nq962ctnkj7jk8p7120varviiei2vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi6co34cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2e151f5qt9j8bdvls2j87r08s3b097868031dk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi6co34cph2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdq2sm7cb30pch80qm8o387vip3kthd1e9rhpj8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi6co34cph2bs)
---
| | You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z559g89g445v0hlo0pgcrehoj0i4bm9g65fb1so0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi6co34cph2bs)

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5rtgo4k8pqm9jtq74u5fm9q24j91p1c38arc1i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi6co34cph2bs)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack

Founder, Libertas Institute

name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7720%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=Q6me3EgsIA6OwfHpjx4SmA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91371%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QXUWiKSGP%2bjj44sGozkviw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91372%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FXO1rzP1Cs3Invu0SBZupw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91372%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FXO1rzP1Cs3Invu0SBZupw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7720%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=Q6me3EgsIA6OwfHpjx4SmA&sysid=1)_

name: American Briefing
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z03hnjrt5jmlgic1fse2naa3114rse1o6v4nmcn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi62o74chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2b0usrnr3gu0afnut1t4677jrteu93qeippipp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi62o74chh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqd08rkd7fd3ccte28pgeltlktig8t8gbgu6bhn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi62o74chh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2c81caemkb271u4bnhcjg7fv65ggi4ddfqcbg48_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi61ob3clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9n2m41a6720ha7ru958galh9n36f7rev7gsbrf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi61ob3clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. This fact means that we’re losi This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. name: ConservativeFWD
subject: The revival of socialism
body:
To answer this question, the Hoover Institution gathered a group of its scholars to study the revival of socialism and current p
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zndlt89mf0rjjbda8d2fm5msu49i8clpmg75vuoo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tpmccr36spm6hqb5c376hi79p5lm1oreodjc1rj4orjctj7cd9lmlqjbdbim9jrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p76phh6ipm8pti6pj31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmepj3chge2or4c8iv0)
Hayek told us that, if old truths are to retain their hold on men's minds, they must be restated in the language and concepts of successive generations.
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zifv1kpup1v21iql6ol380g3a5rdscaoi1bsu3ao_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi61ob3chh2bs)
---

---
| | Dear Friend,

Noble Prize winning economist F.A. Hayek told us that if old truths are to retain their hold on men's minds, they must be restated in the language and concepts of successive generations.

Scores of Americans weren't alive to experience the many atrocities of the 20th century that were caused by socialist systems. Because of this, socialist ideas are experiencing a revival in the U.S. and around the world. Proponents claim a more compassionate and positive effect on human flourishing.

But what is the truth?

To answer this question, the Hoover Institution gathered a group of its scholars to study the revival of socialism and current policy debates between socialist factions and their free-market counterparts.

And the results are eye-opening.

From what I'm told, you are someone who would be interested in learning about this phenomenon, and that's why I'm emailing you today.

Our team recently launched a new online course called Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism: The Revival of Socialism in Current Policy Debates, so you can learn directly from these scholars about their findings. And I want to invite you to take it for FREE as my guest.

Inside these 6 lessons you'll learn about:
* Constitutional safeguards against socialism
* False promises of socialism
* The effects of overregulation and anti-poverty policies

You can activate your free online course right now by using this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/hp-revival_socialism-signup/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6sh7tlek2ceohdfjdjfk4dki3vdtcke0bgola4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi61ob3chh2bs)**

When you do, you'll receive Lesson 1 by email within minutes. Subsequent lessons will be emailed to you every 5 days until the course is completed.

With socialism experiencing a revival, it is vital that we revisit its record so we can restate its consequences "in the language and concepts of successive generations."

I hope you'll take me up on this offer to refresh your learning about the revival of socialism. **[Please use this link to get instant access to your free online course today!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zs8qceecu1u79dli319cakbt1jgua2datve43l48_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdi61ob3chh2bs)** Thank you,
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgjlqgi5phl2jtp5mvbg9rso6frtv53i8t0r5l40_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdh60oj2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmoqku4uv1loc0153nv39nd1v8f9153gq9h10e5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdh60oj2c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk07rlo2hu8s7igr8omrt2j0rbn00r1vetpsnrv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdh60oj2c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

Now, we are ready to deliver.

As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to lead the charge in Congress to fulfill our commitments to you. Truly, this isn't about me - it's about serving YOU and your needs the best that we can.

House Republicans are united with me to build (1) an economy that's strong, (2) a nation that's safe, (3) a future that's built on freedom, and (4) a government that's accountable...

Dear True American,

As the months ticked away in 2022, the state of our country continued to spiral out of control.

All hope seemed to be lost.

Until...

With a raised fist in the air, all our worries seemed to cool...

As President Trump announced his EPIC presidential run in 2024!

But you know what won't cool...?

Your coffee!

Because of this incredible announcement, we have decided to give away 250 of our high quality, double insulated [Trump Tumblers](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11247/6374453/6bee9d4a645666317061492af67c8229b08a0524/1419e9569a774c469e9f0e31893ac4197a3bfb32) for **JUST USD10.**

This stainless steel, laser etched engraved "Trump 2024" **tumbler is yours for over 80% off** what we normally sell it for (USD49.99)...

And you're getting this steller deal...

As a thank you for supporting the man who will ["Save America Again"!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11247/6374453/6bee9d4a645666317061492af67c8229b08a0524/1419e9569a774c469e9f0e31893ac4197a3bfb32)

This is no dollar store mug either... it's stylish, BPA Free and guaranteed to keep your hot beverages HOT and cold beverages COLD.

Don't wait...

Just like the liberal tears of this country won't last...

Neither will this deal.

[**Grab yours here now!** ](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11247/6374453/6bee9d4a645666317061492af67c8229b08a0524/1419e9569a774c469e9f0e31893ac4197a3bfb32)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Sharing the big news with you personally, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
I wanted to share the official news with you personally, friend:

**I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support _today_****is so important.**

The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too.

But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign.
**So that’s what I’m asking of you today, friend. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.**

**[_Please, will you give $5 or more right now — as much as you can spare before midnight tonight — to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57276816/387411008/-1386043057?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3871-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmZkNjViMS01MzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_IbvNLcWU_0hLSeuPGuU9f-WJ-Iw59xL2ACOlnTkHlg=)**
I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: securing health care for the 9/11 first responders; repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell;” and making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic.

But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a permanent paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that.

**The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues. And since I refuse to take a single cent of corporate PAC money, I'm relying entirely on your grassroots support to make sure we can take them head on and win.[_Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now to become a 2024 Founding Donor, defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57276817/387411009/-1386043057?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3871-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmZkNjViMS01MzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_IbvNLcWU_0hLSeuPGuU9f-WJ-Iw59xL2ACOlnTkHlg=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57276818/387411010/-1386043057?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk3871-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmZkNjViMS01MzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_IbvNLcWU_0hLSeuPGuU9f-WJ-Iw59xL2ACOlnTkHlg=)

Kirsten

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I’m FIRING Omar, Swalwell, and Schiff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I'm putting a stop to this and taking Ilhan Omar off of the Foreign Affairs Committee [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7723%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=DrAvT4sujtt%2b7EVasjGoCg&sysid=1)

| |
---
| | | Friend,

Are you sick of Ilhan Omar, Eric Swalwell, Adam Schiff & their antics?

I am.

Now that we've taken back the majority, I'm putting a stop to this and taking Ilhan Omar off of the Foreign Affairs Committee and Eric Swalwell and Adam Schiff off of the Intelligence Committee.

---
| | [FIRE ILHAN OMAR](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91380%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QJeUJ3jNNT4NWQBk8hJF2g&sysid=1)

If you're with me, I need you to add your name in the next 60 minutes to FIRE all three:

Thank you,

Kevin McCarthy

body:
|
---
| | Bumping this survey: Now that we’re in a new session of Congress, we need to hear from you.

**[What are the main priorities Democrats should focus on?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57279149/387420141/-1054436738?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230113_SV_1.2_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGE1OTNhZC01YTkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DVUfXx4_BYXRZhJ9mYufZZ2YSGtFq0x84zHGs0UofHI=&emci=0bf50a4b-9d81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=60a593ad-5a93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=5260669) With the chambers of Congress split, we can’t afford to be anything but determined, unflinching, and precise in _everything_ we do.**
* * *
**_Begin forwarded message:_**
**IMPORTANT:** Peter, against all odds, Democrats won far more races than any poll predicted.

Now that we’re starting a brand new session of Congress, we need to know what you want Democrats to focus on over the next two years.

The Cut’s latest profile is a full feature interview with Becca on how she plans to deliver through the ever-present partisan divide in Washington – and it’s worth the read. – Team Becca Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to ever serve Vermont in Congress. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=02ad25262af64387accbc39afe3417c9&_e=69bGZWmq0A_bemkTZjIxMSWubbdimtTJvT2YmOI7UCEWWGf7m-Qcl5MzIeeWGddnpFphmTiqtNEorBUtitIXIw4iJFeoUWYmMPfDUCTP8OtZr5ELbPRvTRPPQmCUDR3irgmU2GSDOSawQTnMPTCCaDJFemz7ZTkyyHooOLnKPve3i58mKo8DV4NkD0SGH0mt7SgN5uPUShdzPm-TDxUjPIw8IkhxJQ2FoCWkuOe1P1fZzpQhQ-ZqI_OiGXmhcxXruoaWg7y1TjpPucoSYfZm9gUbWqi58E3GEmO0Db1sh4juV6sK8FHYfXrzuXtwHY_5LC03gLC_rbaUq2SolOLlTguB0qPUqozQWdhkXy8aG1fK0Hc4m7ptLiq94DCSck9i12H0Ka7PQUTGQhDqPuJzTf8HkbS-FhMVIWtQBr39g5Q%3D)

| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=02ad25262af64387accbc39afe3417c9&_e=69bGZWmq0A_bemkTZjIxMSWubbdimtTJvT2YmOI7UCEWWGf7m-Qcl5MzIeeWGddnpFphmTiqtNEorBUtitIXIw4iJFeoUWYmMPfDUCTP8OtZr5ELbPRvTRPPQmCUDR3irgmU2GSDOSawQTnMPTCCaDJFemz7ZTkyyHooOLnKPve3i58mKo8DV4NkD0SGH0mt7SgN5uPUShdzPm-TDxUjPIw8IkhxJQ2FoCWkuOe1P1fZzpQhQ-ZqI_OiGXmhcxXr0rAIRIxTXbnI1hGhxolQjCvNHjTVC5aapj5q7Scgd4VkFf4WoJGjztBMoeZUpatcjh73vLEhtl1lyt-hVLrvkGC-yqZOvoJMS6mPD1y-TaTx680W7t_eE8sCZJXS1jYj9rtVeBfoGBgSisyte2RM3qvgcdYOXRU-EgrTdZhb0YI%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=02ad25262af64387accbc39afe3417c9&_e=69bGZWmq0A_bemkTZjIxMSWubbdimtTJvT2YmOI7UCEWWGf7m-Qcl5MzIeeWGddnpFphmTiqtNEorBUtitIXIw4iJFeoUWYmMPfDUCTP8OtZr5ELbPRvTRPPQmCUDR3irgmU2GSDOSawQTnMPTCCaDJFemz7ZTkyyHooOLnKPve3i58mKo8DV4NkD0SGH0mt7SgN5uPUShdzPm-TDxUjPIw8IkhxJQ2FoCWkuOe1P1fZzpQhQ-ZqI_OiGXmhcxXrIqth3E_9unLRVaG7fcKYAgRHrAF5ayyovnd_LaoZIKadaLicrTcAQ-r-_KVTbBpa8A8ZLmvJJVMSGCVWaIiAAqIvBNAkVu5gMae-2nHXZliQ7fdnXFVpgXD0Ww-tywGcd7QytCie2gf2JSkJJsVZTkHLJrwrQvFbc0LgfXKPrcU%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Full Mag News
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
| Dear Reader, A strange phenomenon is 'distorting' America's financial system. If you listen to the mainstream media, you'd think a new crash is imminent. But today, former Goldman Sachs Managing Director Dr. Nomi Prins is coming forward with a different kind of prediction. She says: "We ARE about to see a crisis like nothing we've ever seen before. It won't be like the crashes we saw in 2000... 2008... or even 2020. In fact, the next crisis won't be a crash at all." It has nothing to do with a pandemic, or inflation, either... But "Americans who are hoping for a return to 'normal' are about to be left behind by a new reality." In Nomi's latest interview she explains, in detail, what she predicts... and how she expects it to play out. If you have more than $1,000 in the bank, this could be the most important interview you see in the next 60 days. [**Watch her bombshell prediction for America 's economy now. **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe27e24b485941b19ad90c9dafdb3baf&_e=Bx6_BEqqM1d8nFJIuThzOIxiMQzDreCvGJp3aD9n5LOTjG_35ce02J5tCPzUTBNMGGan2eoGEElLP9bvQkeSUqNGLMyxgZ2uch6CY_cfQoRpGSBe_hJB_kjIUmR9BnFtZL4qoFNSeptfHje2ZOP5yQkZZm68DanZW1jdb7ygg68IYzm7MkmR3o5gIATgmFrQk7RAcHMPRc8IhxR969Y8x3moOtJPNQ5TvQ9JEO6ec3KK_qCmFmd0GXdcTL3qs0BF) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** In 2018, Nomi called for a crash that would wipe out investors. Today, that's the last thing on her mind. [**Click here to find out what she sees coming instead**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe27e24b485941b19ad90c9dafdb3baf&_e=Bx6_BEqqM1d8nFJIuThzOIxiMQzDreCvGJp3aD9n5LOTjG_35ce02J5tCPzUTBNMGGan2eoGEElLP9bvQkeSUqNGLMyxgZ2uch6CY_cfQoQYuVA_FwLf1AN0dj4YW2WHJG2Hf6H4fZrQlEQmFxL6fCgSiZhciI7acI4GnPgj3nNEDXOFpLSftx94FBYs4aChOx7x3agMJrfQ4CM8r0gp3iau42sVBPjx2wD-HCfTb5bOTwzbC4xnG8QyvvFILWiC) - and why investors could be left behind if they don't act now.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a400690980294c45a78d7416cf407523&_e=4wm3BhSaU9pCXEEBDeRfvLGU29vFA7KpsgcgLXbgbJIY832fUmnCfLM2MwF6WXr24ddgXPKFWoUMOPJqIAnOQx9Q_MQ1JDGxoFU4f1yOjdSvm6qqnbfS80060o3qvkxg_dlSPcnsIm24s-GwEDVMdsA7o70Bg4aB319l37OTOFDqkIh9Ly-XMPvWmzClABq9yuDFR-RB935b_ovYHhQdSkcQzC1UBMCVZT_j8h8mUrR59ZO06AvOBhgPKvsm_Uqj1t7BLKl4fmaYQNqcW__D8l-t1BWrSPa8xSGXGOy0jcIzJwG5QkNZ5OnSsmd-wEZYUeWahXDg7AXKK9zGVHSUfjsUVyFhx3gk59SfRSzuqYQ1KkN90_QGrQSg3zIw86y5y20tSRi5szWsQianbPrfYg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a400690980294c45a78d7416cf407523&_e=4wm3BhSaU9pCXEEBDeRfvLGU29vFA7KpsgcgLXbgbJIY832fUmnCfLM2MwF6WXr24ddgXPKFWoUMOPJqIAnOQx9Q_MQ1JDGxoFU4f1yOjdSvm6qqnbfS80060o3qvkxg_dlSPcnsIm24s-GwEDVMdsA7o70Bg4aB319l37OTOFDqkIh9Ly-XMPvWmzClABq9yuDFR-RB935b_ovYHhQdSkcQzC1UBMCVZT_j8h8mUrRUhVXlyR1tqLcMzvRwfBSIQ5JemqplhRk9hgJ4b8tn5YHzjJoHHHTNtl7z-ekg0_OUQS8LOmqdE0gDW5bbezsHgCu2q3oaNCGPHYR-SI1HG8W6nqL2l4lM316E-m62WdFo8ZO6Flqrk0oUSDshlSamfjNa2UYKzz0WoSbOWNVh8Q%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a400690980294c45a78d7416cf407523&_e=4wm3BhSaU9pCXEEBDeRfvLGU29vFA7KpsgcgLXbgbJIY832fUmnCfLM2MwF6WXr24ddgXPKFWoUMOPJqIAnOQx9Q_MQ1JDGxoFU4f1yOjdSvm6qqnbfS80060o3qvkxg_dlSPcnsIm24s-GwEDVMdsA7o70Bg4aB319l37OTOFDqkIh9Ly-XMPvWmzClABq9yuDFR-RB935b_ovYHhQdSkcQzC1UBMCVZT_j8h8mUrToWq89Ca1RlG1AMwohKMblQgjlCWEmaaSND47y6HLNf2U66Vj7nLVnuA1Pvr8rQuWuKc8oDOTSmRJ-WwSWJqhTVp1A4YTnVtY9xI6oetxGLuAB9cHkOm2kdW_dYNuamIUd2jQQTDCOOABFmtlQeaTuRDZuyiyywKC8cCej2zvGNw%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=a400690980294c45a78d7416cf407523&_t=IxyPMYwf8mTvZZ_LLDDTNcBMnXYNZhoVy8w9ubkc19E5Wb81pSnRWxCfThLOdBiwaw3uJRnxS0Eb4AopgzCUg-Tbm0nAtwYnx2f8xsLhesYKm3j-eTXBH9cmxbZnqJ7-TXMDDs8ukNwHkJR-iy8O_NfHIfCaO04voSRAUMDfK-k%3D)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible
body:
Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis.
| |
---
| | My fellow concerned American,Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis._Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible_ ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her “bravery” and for giving your child the body he or she was “always meant to have.”I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. **Except it’s not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria.** The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl – Chloe Cole – after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive.**I need your help to fund this legal battle.**[**Will you donate an urgent $35 or more tax-deductible gift today to the Center for American Liberty to help cover our lawyer fees, months of research, and expert witness costs?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z55vfq380l561tdgl27680fc21n8f7d6bqt7p66o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdh61p35chh2bs) Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case.When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to “transition” her from being a girl to a boy.She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical “professionals” coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering “treatment.”**Doctors told her parents they could either have a “dead daughter or a living son.”** Then, doctors lied to Chloe.They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself.

We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood.Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical “professionals” pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them.Specifically, they gave her**Lupon Depot** to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug.**Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her.** And it’s time to hold them accountable.My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I’m helping Chloe finally receive justice.So, with your support, we’re suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe.Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them.Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman—and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won’t be easily won – we’re facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported **$8 billion** profit in 2021 alone. [**So, if you’re in the position to make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center of American Liberty today to help us win a historic victory against predatory doctors and hospitals butchering children for profit, I hope you will.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbh7f8pqfuj5s52h9h7m3qndfvo6hb7k5fte84io_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdh61p35chh2bs) These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical “professionals” have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight—likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests.But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere.Will you stand with her?Thank you for supporting our mission today.
---
Sincerely,

clean_body: Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis. | | | | My fellow concerned American,Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis.Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her “bravery” and for giving your child the body he or she was “always meant to have.”I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. Except it’s not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria. The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl – Chloe Cole – after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive.I need your help to fund this legal battle. Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case.When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to “transition” her from being a girl to a boy.She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical “professionals” coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering “treatment.”Doctors told her parents they could either have a “dead daughter or a living son.” Then, doctors lied to Chloe.They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself. We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood.Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical “professionals” pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them.Specifically, they gave herLupon Depot to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug.Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her. And it’s time to hold them accountable.My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I’m helping Chloe finally receive justice.So, with your support, we’re suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe.Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them.Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman—and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won’t be easily won – we’re facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported $8 billion profit in 2021 alone. These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical “professionals” have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight—likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests.But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere.Will you stand with her?Thank you for supporting our mission today. Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. If we don’t fight back now and hold these medical “professionals” accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. We can’t allow that. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
I wanted to share the official news with you personally, Peter: | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57283040/387435731/-2001680059?refcode=20230113_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_30_cl_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjU1MjFiZS02MzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4Rp98BMcqjSJwG9VPPvPnSyJsYkgbM3JodH6wZQGM0=)
---
I wanted to share the official news with you personally, Peter:
[**I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support _today_ is so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57283044/387435735/-2001680059?refcode=20230113_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_30_cl_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjU1MjFiZS02MzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4Rp98BMcqjSJwG9VPPvPnSyJsYkgbM3JodH6wZQGM0=)
The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades – enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too.
But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign.
[**So that’s what I’m asking of you today, Peter. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57283047/387435738/-2001680059?refcode=20230113_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_30_cl_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjU1MjFiZS02MzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4Rp98BMcqjSJwG9VPPvPnSyJsYkgbM3JodH6wZQGM0=)
[_**Please, will you split $15 between my campaign and Hakeem Jeffries to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57283052/387435745/-2001680059?refcode=20230113_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_30_cl_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjU1MjFiZS02MzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4Rp98BMcqjSJwG9VPPvPnSyJsYkgbM3JodH6wZQGM0=)
I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic.
But there are so many critical fights ahead – for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a _permanent_ paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that.
[**The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57283057/387435751/-2001680059?refcode=20230113_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_30_cl_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjU1MjFiZS02MzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4Rp98BMcqjSJwG9VPPvPnSyJsYkgbM3JodH6wZQGM0=) [_**Please, Peter, will you split $15 between my campaign and Hakeem’s to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57283061/387435756/-2001680059?refcode=20230113_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_30_cl_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjU1MjFiZS02MzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4Rp98BMcqjSJwG9VPPvPnSyJsYkgbM3JodH6wZQGM0=)

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats.

Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. clean_body: I wanted to share the official news with you personally, Peter: | | = I wanted to share the official news with you personally, Peter: = The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades – enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too. But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign. = = I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic. But there are so many critical fights ahead – for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a permanent paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Kirsten Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Voting Rights Under Attack in 2023!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project P
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57284360/387440721/934092202?refcode=newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1ZDA3ZDdjLTY2OTMtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VSoYe6OGm__zkCy0SEFYh1Qz134H2pxOx05KOMNu3So=&emci=97abed95-ce92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=45d07d7c-6693-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1522179)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Happy New Year, ! We hope the first eBlast of the New Year finds you well. Team NPP is back at work as we continue our year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education and mobilization in the communities we center including; historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth. We hope you enjoy reading the following biweekly eBlast, and catching up on what’s happening in Harrisburg, relevant news you can use and upcoming events - including where you’ll find NPP during Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. Weekend of Service.
---
---
|
---
# Whats Happening In Harrisburg
---
**Senate passes Constitutional Amendments: Two-Year Window, coupled with Voter ID and Election Audits**
* The Republican-controlled state senate used victims of childhood sexual assault as political pawns in their agenda. By coupling a commonsense, bipartisan-supported window to justice with a slate of controversial and deeply divisive election law changes, they are shamelessly sabotaging that justice for victims.
* Pennsylvania has identification requirements for voting. You must verify your ID when you register, when you request a mail-in ballot, and when you vote for the first time at a new polling place.
* Requiring Voter ID creates needless barriers for voters and creates chaos at the local level for election workers. It will need to be implemented without guidance, causing long lines, delays, and opens a new opportunity for bad actors to pose challenges to valid votes.
* Any policy that creates yet another barrier for Pennsylvanians to cast their vote, is not in the best interest of our commonwealth.

Read more about this in the [Penn Capital Star](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57284361/387440722/-1382248099?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1ZDA3ZDdjLTY2OTMtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VSoYe6OGm__zkCy0SEFYh1Qz134H2pxOx05KOMNu3So=&emci=97abed95-ce92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=45d07d7c-6693-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1522179).
---
|

# NPP In The News

**[Rep. Perry, MAGA extremists condemned at Jan. 6 remembrance rally (PennLive)](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57284363/387440724/1642842903?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1ZDA3ZDdjLTY2OTMtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VSoYe6OGm__zkCy0SEFYh1Qz134H2pxOx05KOMNu3So=&emci=97abed95-ce92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=45d07d7c-6693-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1522179)** [**Delaware County Marks Martin Luther King Jr. Day (DelCo Times)**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57284364/387440725/1207060291?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1ZDA3ZDdjLTY2OTMtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VSoYe6OGm__zkCy0SEFYh1Qz134H2pxOx05KOMNu3So=&emci=97abed95-ce92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=45d07d7c-6693-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1522179) “Honoring Dr. King’s legacy and work to create a world free of injustice, this year’s celebration will mark the return of an in-person celebration. The message will focus on voter rights advocacy. Three community heroes will be inducted into the MLK Spirit Hall of Fame: Akeiff Staples and Brent Johnstone, co-founders of FathersRead365 (FR365) as well as this year’s keynote speaker Kadida Kenner of the New Pennsylvania Project. The celebration will feature selections from musical guests Danie Ocean and Kathy Anthony.“

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Happy New Year, ! We hope the first eBlast of the New Year finds you well. Team NPP is back at work as we continue our year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education and mobilization in the communities we center including; historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth. We hope you enjoy reading the following biweekly eBlast, and catching up on what’s happening in Harrisburg, relevant news you can use and upcoming events - including where you’ll find NPP during Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. Weekend of Service. | Whats Happening In Harrisburg Senate passes Constitutional Amendments: Two-Year Window, coupled with Voter ID and Election Audits The Republican-controlled state senate used victims of childhood sexual assault as political pawns in their agenda. By coupling a commonsense, bipartisan-supported window to justice with a slate of controversial and deeply divisive election law changes, they are shamelessly sabotaging that justice for victims. Pennsylvania has identification requirements for voting. You must verify your ID when you register, when you request a mail-in ballot, and when you vote for the first time at a new polling place. Requiring Voter ID creates needless barriers for voters and creates chaos at the local level for election workers. It will need to be implemented without guidance, causing long lines, delays, and opens a new opportunity for bad actors to pose challenges to valid votes. Any policy that creates yet another barrier for Pennsylvanians to cast their vote, is not in the best interest of our commonwealth. Read more about this in the . | Upcoming Events for MLK Day Celebrate the Lives of Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King JR and Dr. George Washington Carver Jan 14, 2023 at 10am11am - 2pm: BrunchPark Place AME Ministries, 215 E 10th Ave Homestead, PA Martin Luther King Jr Celebration Sunday, Jan 15, 2023 at 4pm First Presbyterian Church750 N Evans St. Pottstown, PA 19464 Sponsored by the the Pottstown Ministerium of Faith** Monday, January 16, 2023 at 12:00 NoonThe Enduring Ideals & Legacy of Rev. Martin Luther King, Jr.Learn about Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr’s inspirational rise to historical prominence. Hear his message of nonviolent resistance. Discover how Dr. King’s ideals can inspire and elevate your life. Celebrate Martin Luther King, Jr. Day with this special slide lecture program and a delicious slice of birthday cake in honor of his memory.FREE to members, non-member adults $8, non-member children 2-11 years $3, under 2 years free. Central PA MLK Day of Service Mon, Jan 16, 2023 Harrisburg, PA9am: Open Ceremony9:30am - 1pm: Jobs and Housing Fair10am - 1pm: Volunteer ActivitiesFree and open to all Visit: centralpamlkday.org Martin Luther King Community of Greater Kennett AreaJan 16, 2023 Doors open 9:30amLincoln University Wellness CenterKeynote Speaker: Diplomat, Oliver St. Clair Franklin, OBE10am - 3pm Celebration | NPP In The News “Honoring Dr. King’s legacy and work to create a world free of injustice, this year’s celebration will mark the return of an in-person celebration. The message will focus on voter rights advocacy. Three community heroes will be inducted into the MLK Spirit Hall of Fame: Akeiff Staples and Brent Johnstone, co-founders of FathersRead365 (FR365) as well as this year’s keynote speaker Kadida Kenner of the New Pennsylvania Project. The celebration will feature selections from musical guests Danie Ocean and Kathy Anthony.“ | News You Can Use = Al Schmidt, a former election official in Philadelphia, is Gov.-elect Josh Shapiro's choice to run the 2024 election in battleground Pennsylvania. | #TweetoftheWeek | Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. | | **"Proposed 15-week abortion ban introduced on 1st day of General Assembly session" -_Daily Press_** Derek, This year, voters will decide which party will control the Virginia House of Delegates. If Republicans take control? They’ve made it clear they’ll ban abortion after 15 weeks of pregnancy and could go further with a majority. Mark knows that access to safe, legal abortion has never been more in danger in Virginia. With stakes this high, it is critical that we take back the House of Delegates and expand our state Senate majority in this November’s Virginia elections. We can’t sit idly by and allow Republicans to take control and rip away access to reproductive health care. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d5f6d696e88d4f2f88b90de0badb1ee1&_e=-K2AY4bk2pDi4hMGw0KQxKaRvkkfDBR54nmH2vMYbQ0HMt1cMXItebRFX0vIjGIrfuskK2rn0wmw4wLi__78nB9uwPhzdj7pQqdy3bvPNa5Skj82koAvwOdO4r1wlrKvz9Fvcp3scos41EwzbqwAbahSqXx4SK7PI4JGEtqFjhqrXIf5HDYQTuh9GR22Mvuz69PZm7po9yvIDZI9iufgT_zuaZ1xU6PVG83VyLc5cYiIMzKASWh66KJzOSj23MPAHL9Ntcg8mg-ikBMGGCQwBcR0ZKYLvd8C8c-IBlm1l5FSScO3xif7BnCFMcnJDxoi478Ff3aHj-yrq9fp9Ej0b3R8IS3Y-xVfRe79E8ya0iGT74jBlB659PlENaW7XgAeTc4gpYlH94mrmtRiGIPpHg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d5f6d696e88d4f2f88b90de0badb1ee1&_e=-K2AY4bk2pDi4hMGw0KQxKaRvkkfDBR54nmH2vMYbQ0HMt1cMXItebRFX0vIjGIrfuskK2rn0wmw4wLi__78nB9uwPhzdj7pQqdy3bvPNa5Skj82koAvwOdO4r1wlrKvz9Fvcp3scos41EwzbqwAbahSqXx4SK7PI4JGEtqFjhqrXIf5HDYQTuh9GR22Mvuz69PZm7po9yvIDZI9iufgT_zuaZ1xU6PVG83VyLc5cYiIMzKASWh66KJzOSj23MPAGOTHmPdoGHKnoDPe_zgbRmRCE4T_pUx3BlQGsv8hD0PJ1faGq-H8ECY9X-C-ppRdFg0SjUjikwVyuqQtMZyFWzWqg_y0LPiSiJ0sIAmEyhJ0zzP4TEjbIT4oqjiBaG6Ryo8hTgdyPuH7rrJIK-pQTA%3D%3D) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d5f6d696e88d4f2f88b90de0badb1ee1&_e=-K2AY4bk2pDi4hMGw0KQxKaRvkkfDBR54nmH2vMYbQ0HMt1cMXItebRFX0vIjGIrfuskK2rn0wmw4wLi__78nB9uwPhzdj7pQqdy3bvPNa5Skj82koAvwOdO4r1wlrKvz9Fvcp3scos41EwzbqwAbahSqXx4SK7PI4JGEtqFjhqrXIf5HDYQTuh9GR22Mvuz69PZm7po9yvIDZI9iufgT_zuaZ1xU6PVG83VyLc5cYiIMzKASWh66KJzOSj23MPAGM4uNP5vIhj3nKUZfdytuCwVLQ2rw4Cibf02GedvYVK_ovUVwqaPi6h-atLGMOoXxUpcAmc2K34t7exZNC2UOtHI2jzzaYxwY9HtklWegx7MuppTjWFvU6RKv8_gz0hHaOXPaiZIasS-l2E5pa6qWA%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
