name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The new reality in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Dear Peter,

I fought the swamp and won.

I took a strong stand on electing a new Speaker of the House.

The establishment was furious, and the fake news media hurled their usual smears.

**But because conservatives drew a line in the sand, we won votes on:**
---
• SEALING the southern border and ending Joe Biden's illegal alien invasion. • A Balanced Budget Amendment which out a stop to multi-trillion-dollar socialist spending sprees. • Term limits to end the permanent political class's rule in Washington. • Rescinding $72 billion in funding for the Internal Revenue Service that was approved by Congress last year in the Inflation Reduction Act, Democrats' healthcare, tax and climate package. • Prohibit sales from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve to China. • Bar Taxpayer-funded abortions. • Guaranteed placement for two Freedom members on the powerful rules committee.
There are many more concessions conservatives.

**I appeared on Laura Ingraham 's Fox News show to discuss the new reality in Congress.**

**[Please take a few moments to watch my interview](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61378954:sOkhmEDaN:m:1:2365227053:2B6F8BC4CB3076EE35BF4B5F38FEDBE2:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61378954:sOkhmEDaN:m:1:2365227053:2B6F8BC4CB3076EE35BF4B5F38FEDBE2:r)
| | [ CLICK HERE TO WATCH ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61378954:sOkhmEDaN:m:1:2365227053:2B6F8BC4CB3076EE35BF4B5F38FEDBE2:r)
---
**_Now comes the hard work._**

And the swamp certainly won't just roll over.

That's why I hope you will chip in a contribution so I can keep up the fight for our America First values in the new Congress.

I refuse all PAC money - no donations from leadership, corporate and ideological PACs.

I refuse all lobbyist donations.

**I draw my funding and support 100 percent from the MAGA movement.**

I count on you.

**[So please, watch my interview with Laura Ingraham and chip in a contribution so I can keep standing up for you in the fights that matter](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61378954:sOkhmEDaN:m:1:2365227053:2B6F8BC4CB3076EE35BF4B5F38FEDBE2:r).** **[HELP MATT GAETZ FIGHT BACK
❯❯ CHIP IN TODAY ❮❮ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61378954:sOkhmEDaN:m:1:2365227053:2B6F8BC4CB3076EE35BF4B5F38FEDBE2:r)** [** CHIP IN $10 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61378954:sOkhmEDaN:m:1:2365227053:2B6F8BC4CB3076EE35BF4B5F38FEDBE2:r) [** CHIP IN $25 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61378954:sOkhmEDaN:m:1:2365227053:2B6F8BC4CB3076EE35BF4B5F38FEDBE2:r) [** CHIP IN $50 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61378954:sOkhmEDaN:m:1:2365227053:2B6F8BC4CB3076EE35BF4B5F38FEDBE2:r) [** CHIP IN $100 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61378954:sOkhmEDaN:m:1:2365227053:2B6F8BC4CB3076EE35BF4B5F38FEDBE2:r) [** CHIP IN $250 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61378954:sOkhmEDaN:m:1:2365227053:2B6F8BC4CB3076EE35BF4B5F38FEDBE2:r) [** CHIP IN NOW >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61378954:sOkhmEDaN:m:1:2365227053:2B6F8BC4CB3076EE35BF4B5F38FEDBE2:r) **Sincerely,**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Newly-elected Rep. George Santos is now being investigated for crimes in the United States and Brazil. Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington (CREW) put investigators onto his tracks, and we need more work like that!
body:
Ferreting out the crooks with CREW
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf39e79f8-0aaf-40c2-a02b-fc5bb0fa0ecc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, George Santos is now being investigated for crimes in the United States and Brazil. Investigators were put onto his tracks by Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington (CREW.) [**Would you join us in giving CREW $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can today, so we can be sure someone will get to the bottom of the criminality that seems to naturally emanate from George Santos?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f397599-0e66-44a0-804b-72ffcc7ebf32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In addition to the fact he's wanted in Brazil for using a stolen checkbook and fake name to commit bank fraud, **Congressmen Ritchie Torres and Dan Goldman hand delivered an ethics complaint to Santos' office that they filed with the Congressional Ethics Office because Santos' breaking campaign finance law numerous times.** He ignored legally required filings, even more important in his case as he was broke when he ran for office in 2020, but suddenly had millions--a big chunk of which he loaned his campaign--in 2022. We know that the Russian-American cousin of sanctioned Russian oligarch and friend of Putin Viktor Vekselberg funneled nearly $60,000 in total to various PACs, committees and the local Nassau County Republican Party (who just demanded he resign) for Santos' campaign. **But where did the rest of the money come from?** Was it illegally funneled through his business by the same Russians? Others? We don't know because Santos ignored the law and refused to tell us. What Torres and Goldman have done is important, but with Republicans in control jelly-spined Kevin McCarthy will do all he can to weaken this effort.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f35cf98-41eb-4f04-b5fa-61a10b92a44c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This is why we need Citizens for Responsible Ethics in Washington (CREW) on this. They are the kind of bulldogs who get results, going after names in the past you'll know such as Tom DeLay, Jack Abramoff and you can almost pick any name from the thoroughly corrupt Trump Administration. [**Would you join us in giving CREW $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can today, so we can be sure someone will get to the bottom of the criminality that seems to naturally emanate from George Santos?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78839636-323c-4067-91b2-9dc69323464e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for protecting the integrity of our democracy. Cliff

Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06cfa8255e684c6fbd32ae6719018dfe&_e=_Rbx9Zw4AEqpiX4ffNQ66WtZariIgj0xov51ELC9YhdptiVEkDRZo1HTWkmTJzNBAfYP0xHbLVqjdz0w9nNtDo5QH-kdxOYkfTaF-rXkEkD-iSIxjNy5DBsog8bKObncv9XRUNZo4iyEBtD5fAvNf2JMvAZ4ZF8NycTLdeo9JrVX6YcHxC6RG-qLhVMEYnI1iLBB1WwhlYZAbtI0s895LrRdXhRVnocGyLZ_yLs456HEmBjV6aWBSUNhDM2kqjBwozynMGk59hKTgRaaGoC4xJDw2AGElxPxy1rM4jPu1XD2_TDoiB2RKa3LIMPn9gWVaq3DzfWwhaKWxaSOFR6pYA%3D%3D)

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06cfa8255e684c6fbd32ae6719018dfe&_e=_Rbx9Zw4AEqpiX4ffNQ66WtZariIgj0xov51ELC9YhdptiVEkDRZo1HTWkmTJzNBAfYP0xHbLVqjdz0w9nNtDo5QH-kdxOYkfTaF-rXkEkD-iSIxjNy5DBsog8bKObncv9XRUNZo4iyEBtD5fAvNf2JMvAZ4ZF8NycTLdeo9JrVX6YcHxC6RG-qLhVMEYnI1nh8I9W9rkq6WRvz299r3cz-XFeM_Qgi_23lwbId3PMS_8_lH-_hnjr0dMu3ytWKhogxwhrpSC_QxSav1XQiAyGlhYbumt99FqUTdpfaTZ8q8SaK0KocMuYFwBf1VJeUz6x0jff9TU8siDjmr4VuPpw%3D%3D) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06cfa8255e684c6fbd32ae6719018dfe&_e=_Rbx9Zw4AEqpiX4ffNQ66WtZariIgj0xov51ELC9YhdptiVEkDRZo1HTWkmTJzNBAfYP0xHbLVqjdz0w9nNtDo5QH-kdxOYkfTaF-rXkEkD-iSIxjNy5DBsog8bKObncv9XRUNZo4iyEBtD5fAvNf2JMvAZ4ZF8NycTLdeo9JrVX6YcHxC6RG-qLhVMEYnI1Po3-RaNVuoKN_9UjM_VuLsP9Rc8SpxqlDpqhazygm-S31pe4gk3K8uKnTT3M-tSlMim6NUzDyZayiGfKLMiDjjZhntgIgb2rhWNsjcwI_pkMHNY29MJ2kAgD3MOdqzlPmQvduQY0al6XYPKfdevkQQ%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway. Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments. name: Byron Donalds
subject: Last Friday’s deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
Here’s the critical changes we secured.
Here's the critical changes we secured.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjs9bsqk1elddtgrd0m7auh9edc5absr4gf0uggg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdj62or4cth2bs)
---
Friend,
---
The institution in Washington is broken. Congress doesn't work for the American people, and to be honest, it hasn't in a long time.
---
**Corrupt establishment swamp politicians have repeatedly sold-out hard-working Americans while doling out favors to lobbyists and special interest groups.**
---
In order to effectively fight for YOU over the next two years, we needed to make fundamental, institutional changes to the way that Congress functions.
---
_That 's why I joined 19 of my colleagues to hold the line in the people's House until we secured a deal that accomplished the following: _
---
* Reverses Nancy Pelosi's rule change and returns the House to the 100+ year precedent of allowing a single member to bring up a motion to remove a speaker if they break their promises or betray the American people.

* Promises a vote on term limits and a Texas border security plan.

* Requires single subject bills instead of several thousand-page monstrosities that are full of unrelated provisions and irrelevant nonsense.

* Requires a minimum of 72 hours to read and review the contents of a bill.

* Establishes an investigation into the weaponization of the FBI, DOJ, and other government agencies.

* Holds Biden and Senate Democrats in check by ensuring that debt ceiling increases will be accompanied by reductions in spending.

---
Now, conservatives will be able to truly fight for WE THE PEOPLE with our new House majority.
---
[**Please make a contribution to support us as we hold the line against the Swamp and fight on your behalf in the 118th Congress.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdcuk0dtkgpjuh1fpf8p1epf9scq6plcsslfp348_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdj62or4cth2bs)

---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp38o9a7cp9jlurp71inh6v3rvmn6af1gvi9e740_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdj62or4cth2bs)
---

Some of the institutional changes we secured may seem small, but they are things that are critical for the House moving forward.
---
After the FBI's illegal and partisan raid on President Trump's home last summer, we've got to pursue investigations to explore possible abuses of power.
---
The motion to vacate rule for the speaker was in place in the House for over a hundred years until Nancy Pelosi changed it, and reinstating it is a huge step towards restoring accountability in Washington.
---
_In the real world, if you lead a company, it only takes one member of the board of directors to hold a vote against the chairman of the board or the CEO._
---
It shouldn't be any different in Congress. Restoring the single-member threshold ensures that any future speaker is fully accountable to the members.
---
_If you want the job of leading the House, then you shouldn 't be afraid of that. _
---
**Requiring single subject bills and a minimum of 72 hours to read and review them are major steps towards transparency and reducing wasteful spending.**
---
Far too often in Washington, various laws, provisions, and funding for dozens of separate, unrelated issues are cobbled together into massive Frankenstein bills.
---
Then, members are only given a few short hours to read them before they're forced to vote yes or no on the entire thing.
---
The recent 4,000+ page omnibus that authorized $1.7 TRILLION in reckless spending is a perfect example of why these rules are desperately needed.
---
These rules changes matter immensely, Friend.
---
_They ultimately dictate how the House functions, and that goes directly to the ability of us accomplishing the solutions that we promised the American people._
---
Things like securing the border, budgetary restraint, and holding the Biden Administration accountable will be much easier to accomplish because of these changes.
---
When I came to Washington, I vowed to stop the destruction being caused by radical far-Left progressives and advance an America First agenda.
---
Last Friday was a massive step towards delivering on that promise.
---
But this was only the beginning. We still have a lot of work to do.
---
To keep up the fight, we're depending on support from grassroots, America First patriots like YOU.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to support us as we hold the line against the Swamp and fight on your behalf in the 118th Congress.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmigqb666mhb0jbap362mtpr0hsob6rjlf6ingh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdj62or4cth2bs)
---
Thank you,

We accomplished so much in the last Congress, and while we’re no longer in the Majority, I know we can still continue our progress by working together towards common goals.

I am focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, ensuring access to health care for all, reducing the costs of prescription drugs, ensuring affordable quality education for all who seek it, and restoring our Great Lakes economy and environment.

We can still come together to address these common-sense issues – that’s what I’ve done my entire career.

**[Now, I’m asking you to support our efforts as we work towards continuing our progress in the new year. Can I count on you to join me with a donation of $5 or whatever you can give today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57295434/387457203/-855837941?refcode=EM_FR_230113FR_N_MK_45DA_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGUxMDhlOS03NTkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JIjMQGjcqg9n5RHXF8AwJY960OEIPJF_WsjGl09DsgA=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57295435/387457204/-855837941?refcode=EM_FR_230113FR_N_MK_45DA_5_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGUxMDhlOS03NTkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JIjMQGjcqg9n5RHXF8AwJY960OEIPJF_WsjGl09DsgA=) Thank you for your support,

Lisa Marie Presley, the only child of the late Elvis Presley, died Thursday. According to her mother, Priscilla Presley, hours after the singer was hospitalized following what seems to be cardiac arrest she passed. She was 54 at the time. Priscilla took to Instagram, sharing the news of her daughter being hospitalized.

| | | | | |
---
| McGuire Senate District 10 Campaign Kickoff
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|

|

|
---
|

|
---
|
---
|
---
| Together we will win, "Right the Ship", and "un-California Virginia! I can't tell you how much fun we had at our campaign kick-off. Folks made the drive from all ten counties in Senate District 10. Our speakers were magnificent. Everyone thanked me for not having to speak after Bishop E.W. Jackson. He fired us up! The event was 11am to 2pm, but many stayed until 4pm. I am humbled by the bridges we are building and the growing coalition of support across the district for my campaign to be your State Senator of District 10. This is the kind of leadership we will need to win in November!
---
| My Opponent's Record
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNPeHbLXdLwPu981sQiBUTbhAmPz4PBicht27wvbu2xyvsjvPwd-Qkt2vQLO8J6jwQ9Rm__rJUFfmH_eM8GTnXLt5hK11p6XpPw==&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==)
---
| You have got to be a convincing salesman in order to get a political party nomination back and forth between both parties. The last time my opponent, Duane Adams of Louisa County, ran for state office in Virginia's Senate District 10, he ran as a Democrat in Hanover County, against beloved Conservative Republican Delegate Frank Hargrove. In fact, he flip-flopped back and forth by running for state office, first as a Republican, and then three times for state office as a Democrat. Now he is running against me to be your Republican State Senator.

[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNPeHbLXdLwPu981sQiBUTbhAmPz4PBicht27wvbu2xyvsjvPwd-Qkt2vQLO8J6jwQ9Rm__rJUFfmH_eM8GTnXLt5hK11p6XpPw==&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==) to read a letter with the facts sent to us from fellow Conservative Republican VA State Senator (retired) Dick Black:

* Fact: President Ronald Reagan never hid the fact that he once voted Democrat before becoming a Republican and he never ever ran for election anywhere in the United States as a Democrat.

---
| 2023 Session Update Week 1
---
|
---
| The General Assembly convened on Wednesday, January 11th marking the beginning of the 403rd legislative session of the House of Delegates.

| Each year I begin session in the Virginia General Assembly by attending the Annual Commonwealth Prayer breakfast. We prayed for Glenn Youngkin, Virginia, and more. I'm asking you to pray for less division and more wisdom and guidance for not only me, but all Virginia leaders.

| 2023 McGuire Legislative Agenda
---
| Here is some of the legislation brought to me by constituents and sponsored by me to improve Virginia.
Bills:
[HB 1436](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNOyUEucVnfBsVovigelb8PnXfE2-ijd4fy-kVpDk0g8QvqcZSIyb3S7Ywah0d-N3Wb2_OzxFUOh5qU3Zum3rDswyqsJhrd6z43IbDMcO-NT7psIGwPYK2LwfEQQKAf6vx3Iez_51hrOgrhgQf1MLmhE=&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==) Income tax, state; military benefits subtraction, age restriction. * [HB 1454 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNIUzYzyjc2CxLHg7lvV2ahYuXHew5UAq-dFDwv_7-CF6T2RxLGBOls7spkm7msLpfXmn2a-ujce-RxBvKxjqrF8Hrq54csj_WLeJTnsxDHcDjgA8pRGpZ75jVm7m-Idf9rb0ak1NuZTCs5TIAzxFEYg=&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==)Home instruction; removes certain criteria for parents. * [HB 1488 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNIUzYzyjc2Cxfss2OChfN3TTsCiaVPdxAOmPKm5-rfQg4zMElZYr98sSqy4Wz-6DsoH46AdrgxozwfpfGUV7eK2h-ajSers0arfLtLRCcl9CZ3bn7a9K_rfs2r_bWiUSHQVy5-qkTmC0JIbuaA80lr8=&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==)Abortion; use of public funds prohibited. * [HB 1507](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNIUzYzyjc2Cx7UNhaWdGLliAWAj-QGFsA8M5ELvA-V7CCnzIP9OrfwywGhajP8vk-idl04aueNjYYKppFJN_GO5lg3U90Yf9dwMQqPnGLhk7yLhyRv539DcfcUCmXhSOjzUtaGuq8BrGfwM3XOJx270=&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==) Public elementary and secondary schools; fundamental right of parents. * [HB 1693](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNNzlLqm5F7MuyNhTrVtoGegN_erVmErCkkXTxnKJNITyKVpneU4-ZIqF0riA9skwqTSJHHQ88NBeu7HgHiquv7Cj3rzLlSuYjlj4kLIoEbelO1IBCCZt6I9GerBctd6lKSkfuPVA27uJRdOlqZSgyms=&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==) Absentee voting; return of absentee ballots, drop-off locations. * [HB](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNNzlLqm5F7Mu1_kBFSt3Z03oOlDfNUPyBRwGVUQ65w5LIpxmXOqNGlDArzFCSNWCu4YvbCqKsEc73UZ6G2wbXacx2Ue5NOa5zZ42eHWEAyks5aQa_Q4Dkwizr_2IyLTdNjzijN30Iwq5R0YUd04zeUA=&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==) 1889 Public institutions of higher education and certain other public educational institutions. * [HB 1891](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNNzlLqm5F7MuMGVONpZw15uXx3ZcuIyounKMWRjBj_zFOb9OttR_wYiYt8cHBRJICG91xcY-6RAwhgPgo-HS4Gx2TqunD-NzxXfR1uJ92v9kZTbv8h5uM5RrtqUefrNcOdfE0jXTJeyotKAQL86W1Po=&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==) Transcranial magnetic stimulation; DBHDS to establish pilot program. [HB 1898](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNNzlLqm5F7MuJMXkQ15Q2IE_xG9jga9hWDmS4v-O8J6UHEMbOG5CizZ-idqCX9cgHO46rrxlWWnBgGAA-IodbItnbgirIzTaQPjT7XFGgRvVmlgaKW4LTUNxKt_WoE4o1Aiq43GGjkFjKoUEHcaIEMc=&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==) Virginia Public Procurement Act; public institutions of higher education; prohibition on boycotting. * [HB 1922](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNNzlLqm5F7MuRm_z3sd6SArBZIHslkvAbiVO9T87ebAx8Ie7_BMO1lCKHQk_jfcGpx-EwcoYu-ralX-y2fU6ekV31Cj-xT7KYUfGrrxdkyFEINvsefE8D0y1Gn0w8SHqa0Xl9p3Vjw1fBBgf-C3bOmg=&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==) Delta-8 tetrahydrocannabinol; distribution; penalty. * [HJ 475](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNIUzYzyjc2Cxm8C0_HFnZBCQJCF1l1Ra6alxVeyH5PILbHHBIT2lQgB_VUj0hBJsibXAdQUc8ebnGlS7LqmiQXns8ez1HwUajLEt7Ij3PI3ZyHInvtYfLr5hCXXcVFMKBBMEGW4TJn-sQd4gt27_hms=&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==) Career and Technical Education Letter of Intent Signing Day; designating as 4th Wed. in April 2023.
[Click this link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNNzlLqm5F7Mude_xpEKgGUqpMVVuatVcgZfl-kYD77eI8Gd9snTIcvX-3Th088AGWJ3NiOA5rUYcK7nFPCfVncsIVUfmxKPDT3s8djNih-_hCyJ694pngQIH8yy9MwG79m139Kv7EwrZnop_HwhYSe8=&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==) for updates and other legislation we support
---
| Grocery Tax Cut Takes Effect
---
|
---
| Thank you, Governor Youngkin, and my good friend, Roanoke Delegate Joe McNamara, for promises kept. On January 1, the sales tax rate on groceries in Virginia decreased from 2.5% to 1%. This was a great first step. We are working hard to finish the job this session! (Great to see my back pack with a baby sock made the photo in the news!)
---
| Our Team is Growing
---
|
---
| Volunteers Wanted! Our team of staff and volunteers is growing. Thank you for helping us improve Virginia. If you want to volunteer on my campaign for State Senate, please email john@mcguireforvirginia.com
---
| 2023 Agribusiness Council 51st Celebration "Ag Prom"
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Powhatan Delegate Lee Ware, Chairman of Agriculture Chesapeake and Natural Resources in the General Assembly, invited all legislators to "Ag Prom", the 51st annual Agribusiness Council Legislative Appreciation dinner. The National Anthem singer was amazing. Farmers and forestry make up the largest industry in Virginia, with a $70 billion-a-year fiscal impact, and also providing 450,000 jobs. I am happy that Louisa County Supervisor Rachel Jones was able to join her son, Brayden, who was there to represent the VA State 4H program as one of the 2022 Youth in Action Award Winners!
"Those who labor in the earth are the chosen people of God". \- Thomas Jefferson
---
| Distinguished Friend of Agriculture
---
|
---
|
---
| Our friend and Chairman of Appropriations Delegate Barry Knight received the Distinguished Friend of Agriculture award at the Virginia Agribusiness Council Legislative Appreciation Banquet.
---
| Back Packs for Kids
---
|
---
| Our friends at the [Bundle of Joy](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNNzlLqm5F7Mus3vp1vonTAW6MdCoH4UuKd0sPDYysPUNnfXR61TvfUs5LAkPm86rcUfsfL-blkGmaffYW2T874Q431qi0_86QPnPwGGqPiL8cMNTzzq_Ml4I2JN1V2ySpbT_PLyPNeNYCFlzAaVQRRyWVFKb3VuLz8isEfqwKVSa4qUkodO1Yefr27cRdcSOZ270w8koNq0hnrq5vOAM74TcIqxLh_EF2VfwgFoYQure&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==) collected 157 backpacks and bags to be given to children entering the foster care system. When they learned these kids are handed a trash bag, they knew something needed to do be done. They hope to double that number next year!
"All of the generosity of the parents and staff of Bundle of Joy was incredible. We can't wait to do it again and collect many more backpacks and help more counties across the Commonwealth." Kelley & Andy Mulcunry
---
| Virginia Citizens Defense League Lobby Day
---
|
---
|
---
| VCDL Lobby Day is going to be on Monday, January 16, with a rally at 11am at the Bell Tower. We are going to have a large agenda, with the Bruen ruling helping us along. Stand with your fellow gun owners to take back our right to keep and bear arms! No one does more to protect our 2nd amendment rights than VCDL. I look forward to speaking to the crowd on Monday. For details, click [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4qLYDD8b_vJNOtEjsJ875DTq6oyO2oe36aZrjysK19jxFyiTGGhNNzlLqm5F7MutHPwbrq63lavGj1A8PO1IhBGb0pOoVOaHg_RkyAySXD9lcUuPoiHIvfKW-6Eiyr7A40HoTDw756RnhBognLMFdNz8bdXCLTL&c=6CD3hsT6tWW4kxNAoqlZt26_vbFNUAE8ltL0U1f94dBR-UPKhEWgwA==&ch=Uj2JgJ9GPDZukjox38vDilCnWnGKjFcuBi3QM556qc7RMuEkDpcPIg==).

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Governor Glenn Youngkin delivered the State of the Commonwealth to the Joint General Assembly. We must get Virginia in gear and work together to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family!

| I attended the Speaker Todd Gilbert reception, hosted at the Jefferson Hotel in downtown Richmond.

| VA Federation of Republican Women
---
|

|

clean_body: | | | | | | | McGuire Senate District 10 Campaign Kickoff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Together we will win, "Right the Ship", and "un-California Virginia! I can't tell you how much fun we had at our campaign kick-off. Folks made the drive from all ten counties in Senate District 10. Our speakers were magnificent. Everyone thanked me for not having to speak after Bishop E.W. Jackson. He fired us up! The event was 11am to 2pm, but many stayed until 4pm. I am humbled by the bridges we are building and the growing coalition of support across the district for my campaign to be your State Senator of District 10. This is the kind of leadership we will need to win in November! | My Opponent's Record | == | You have got to be a convincing salesman in order to get a political party nomination back and forth between both parties. The last time my opponent, Duane Adams of Louisa County, ran for state office in Virginia's Senate District 10, he ran as a Democrat in Hanover County, against beloved Conservative Republican Delegate Frank Hargrove. In fact, he flip-flopped back and forth by running for state office, first as a Republican, and then three times for state office as a Democrat. Now he is running against me to be your Republican State Senator. == to read a letter with the facts sent to us from fellow Conservative Republican VA State Senator (retired) Dick Black: Fact: President Ronald Reagan never hid the fact that he once voted Democrat before becoming a Republican and he never ever ran for election anywhere in the United States as a Democrat. | 2023 Session Update Week 1 | | The General Assembly convened on Wednesday, January 11th marking the beginning of the 403rd legislative session of the House of Delegates. | Annual Commonwealth Prayer Breakfast | | | | | | | | | | Each year I begin session in the Virginia General Assembly by attending the Annual Commonwealth Prayer breakfast. We prayed for Glenn Youngkin, Virginia, and more. I'm asking you to pray for less division and more wisdom and guidance for not only me, but all Virginia leaders. | 2023 McGuire Legislative Agenda | Here is some of the legislation brought to me by constituents and sponsored by me to improve Virginia. Bills: == Income tax, state; military benefits subtraction, age restriction. instruction; removes certain criteria for parents. ; use of public funds prohibited. == Public elementary and secondary schools; fundamental right of parents. == Absentee voting; return of absentee ballots, drop-off locations. == 1889 Public institutions of higher education and certain other public educational institutions. == Transcranial magnetic stimulation; DBHDS to establish pilot program. == Virginia Public Procurement Act; public institutions of higher education; prohibition on boycotting. == Delta-8 tetrahydrocannabinol; distribution; penalty. * == Career and Technical Education Letter of Intent Signing Day; designating as 4th Wed. in April 2023. == for updates and other legislation we support | Grocery Tax Cut Takes Effect | | Thank you, Governor Youngkin, and my good friend, Roanoke Delegate Joe McNamara, for promises kept. On January 1, the sales tax rate on groceries in Virginia decreased from 2.5% to 1%. This was a great first step. We are working hard to finish the job this session! (Great to see my back pack with a baby sock made the photo in the news!) | Our Team is Growing | | Volunteers Wanted! Our team of staff and volunteers is growing. Thank you for helping us improve Virginia. If you want to volunteer on my campaign for State Senate, please email john@mcguireforvirginia.com | 2023 Agribusiness Council 51st Celebration "Ag Prom" | | | | | | | | | | | Powhatan Delegate Lee Ware, Chairman of Agriculture Chesapeake and Natural Resources in the General Assembly, invited all legislators to "Ag Prom", the 51st annual Agribusiness Council Legislative Appreciation dinner. The National Anthem singer was amazing. Farmers and forestry make up the largest industry in Virginia, with a $70 billion-a-year fiscal impact, and also providing 450,000 jobs. I am happy that Louisa County Supervisor Rachel Jones was able to join her son, Brayden, who was there to represent the VA State 4H program as one of the 2022 Youth in Action Award Winners! "Those who labor in the earth are the chosen people of God". \- Thomas Jefferson | Distinguished Friend of Agriculture | | | Our friend and Chairman of Appropriations Delegate Barry Knight received the Distinguished Friend of Agriculture award at the Virginia Agribusiness Council Legislative Appreciation Banquet. | Back Packs for Kids | | Our friends at the == collected 157 backpacks and bags to be given to children entering the foster care system. When they learned these kids are handed a trash bag, they knew something needed to do be done. They hope to double that number next year! "All of the generosity of the parents and staff of Bundle of Joy was incredible. We can't wait to do it again and collect many more backpacks and help more counties across the Commonwealth." Kelley & Andy Mulcunry | Virginia Citizens Defense League Lobby Day | | | VCDL Lobby Day is going to be on Monday, January 16, with a rally at 11am at the Bell Tower. We are going to have a large agenda, with the Bruen ruling helping us along. Stand with your fellow gun owners to take back our right to keep and bear arms! No one does more to protect our 2nd amendment rights than VCDL. I look forward to speaking to the crowd on Monday. For details, click ==. | State of The Commonwealth | | | | Governor Glenn Youngkin delivered the State of the Commonwealth to the Joint General Assembly. We must get Virginia in gear and work together to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family! | Speaker Todd Gilbert Reception | | | | | | | I attended the Speaker Todd Gilbert reception, hosted at the Jefferson Hotel in downtown Richmond. | VA Federation of Republican Women | | | | Many fellow legislators and I attended the == Legislative Luncheon. VFRW is a Republican volunteer organization consisting of over 45 local clubs of diverse women throughout the Commonwealth of Virginia. VFRW is a member of the ==, the largest grassroots organization of active Republican women in the country. Thank you! | Majority Leader Reception | | | | I attended the Majority Leader Terry Kilgore reception, hosted at the Virginia Auto Dealer Association (VADA). | Sandy Rios Podcast! | | Sandy Rios, President of Governmental Affairs, American Family Radio, just started a Podcast, and I was blessed to be one of her first interviews. More on this later! | District 56 Page | | Anna is our Page this session, representing District 56. In addition, helping legislators for 45 days, Pages stay up late, catching up on missed homework. Thank you, to all our Pages, for all you do to help Virginia! == | Candace Owens Running for Office? | == | When == came to Ricmond for Blexit, I was the only Elected Official to attend. Now she has grown in popularity and has become a National Voice as host on her Daily Wire Political Talk Show, "The Candice Owens Show"! | Hanover Delegate Buddy Fowler Annual Food Drive | | Our friend, Hanover Delegate Buddy Fowler, announced his annual drive to collect food for the Food Bank. | Random Photos This Week | | | | | Richmond HBAR Legislative Breakfast | | | | | | Tracy and I attended the Home Builders Association of Richmond HBAR Legislative Breakfast, at the Jefferson Hotel downtown Richmond, with the new 2023 President, Tricia Smith. Bryan Horn, Director of Department of Housing and Community Development, gave the keynote address, and spoke on making housing in Virginia accessible, affordable, and available. David Owen, running for House of Delegates District 57, started us off with a prayer. == | Ellen Campbell Sworn In! | | | Congratulations!! Ellen Campbell was sworn in as Delegate, to complete her late husband and fellow Delegate Ronnie Campbell's term. Thank you, to everyone who supported her election by praying, volunteering, and voting for her on January 10th. == | Senate District 10 Update: | We will have a convention, probably in May, for State Senate District 10. Please == and fill out the form to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. We do not have a date or location for you to vote yet, but by signing up now we can keep you informed and let you know when we know ASAP. | == | Thank You! | I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e. the protection of life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you around the district. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me during session through my Legislative Aid Archer McGiffin at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov or 804-698-1056. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you. | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 NFIB 100 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == Past Newsletters: End of December == Mid December == End of November == Mid November == End of October == Mid October == September == End of August == Mid August == End of July == == == == Mid June == May == April == March == Week 9 == Week 8. == Week 7 == Week 6. == Week 5. == Week 4. == Week 3. == Week 2. == Week 1 == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

Trump’s inflammatory words and actions led to an unprecedented attack against American democracy by insurrectionists doing his bidding. The mountain of evidence obtained by the January 6th Congressional Select Committee is indisputable: Trump and his cronies were plotting a coup to overturn the 2020 presidential election and keep him in office. The Select Committee voted on — and unanimously supported — criminal referrals to the Department of Justice against Trump and his accomplices. It’s time to hold Donald J. Trump fully accountable for his treasonous acts. Here’s what we want to know: Do you think it’s time to press charges against Trump? YES>> [] NO>> [] — Team Swalwell DONATE TO ERIC >> [] [] Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! On your phone? Press here to sign up in just two clicks >> [] Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. DONATE TO ERIC >> [] Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. If you'd still like to stop receiving emails, you can unsubscribe: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress Swalwell For Congress P.O. Box 2847 Dublin, CA 94568 United States

Derek, We wanted to make sure you saw the Democratic response to Glenn Youngkin’s State of the Commonwealth address. **[Click here to watch the response!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57296912/387458192/802599151?refcode=dpva-em-230113-vision&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWYyMGQ5NS03NzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LuNi88t55i2-3uGiCM4kMcf0wRWnPseGvc8knEAaCQU=&emci=5f74f987-5e93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=2af20d95-7793-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=15759664)** **The difference between Glenn Youngkin’s GOP and our Virginia Democrats couldn’t be clearer. Gov. Youngkin is going after abortion rights, failing to address climate change and the housing crisis, and is failing our public school students and their teachers.** Democrats in the General Assembly have put forward a**“Vision for Virginia”** that addresses these issues and more. But Democrats can’t pass meaningful legislation without controlling both chambers of the General Assembly. **That’s where our grassroots supporters (like you!) come in.** **[We have the chance to take back the House of Delegates this year, but we can’t do it without your support. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57297001/387458559/604915258?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.13_b1_hj_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzg4MGE2Zi03ODkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Qdk06rwGyRnIegnGauQA9PCKPvogxdc1BedGxN1u30=) Last Saturday, I was sworn in as the new Democratic Leader. The support you show in my first few days as Leader is essential to reclaiming the House for Democrats so we can continue to deliver For The People. Andrea Salinas and I are asking: Will you rush $10 to make this a historic fundraising period for Democrats? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57297002/387458560/604915258?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.13_b1_hj_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzg4MGE2Zi03ODkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Qdk06rwGyRnIegnGauQA9PCKPvogxdc1BedGxN1u30=) Here’s the deal: Speaker McCarthy is rushing to outraise us to prove that we don’t have what it takes to reclaim the Majority. **_We’re going to prove him absolutely wrong._** Which is why we need a powerful surge of support – 1,000 gifts in my first crucial days as Leader – to kick this year off with a strong foundation for victory, outraise extreme MAGA Republicans and hand them their first upset of the year. clean_body: = Last Saturday, I was sworn in as the new Democratic Leader. Today, I promise you this: House Democrats will always fight for you and your family. But right now, I’m humbly asking you to fight with us. = Here’s the deal: Speaker McCarthy is rushing to outraise us to prove that we don’t have what it takes to reclaim the Majority. We’re going to prove him absolutely wrong. Which is why we need a powerful surge of support – 1,000 gifts in my first crucial days as Leader – to kick this year off with a strong foundation for victory, outraise extreme MAGA Republicans and hand them their first upset of the year. Can Andrea and I count on you to step up in this defining moment? clean_body: | | | Peter, The battle lines are drawn. We’ve taken back the House and EVICTED Nancy Pelosi from the speakership. But just because we have the House doesn’t mean our battle will be easy. Democrats STILL control the Senate, which means it’s up to House Republicans to clean up the radical Left’s mess of the last two years. Right now, we’re coming up on our FIRST. major milestone in the majority - and we need your help. With you on our team, I know we can CRUSH our goal, but I can’t do it alone. Between woke propaganda poisoning our military and our $3.1 trillion dollar debt, Joe Biden and the Democrats have left quite a mess for Republicans to clean up. But as the first Green Beret in Congress, I’m not afraid of a challenge - and I’m CERTAINLY not afraid of the radical Left. And just like on the battlefield, we can’t finish this mission without every member of our A-Team pulling their weight. I need to know you’re on board - and that starts with helping us cross the finish line to our FIRST deadline of 2023. | | In Service, Col. name: Elizabeth Cavalieri, Evergreen Action
subject: 👋 Hello from outside the White House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Photos and video from the #StopWillow rally!
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4412?t=2&akid=13222%2E53494%2EyY4XFX) Hi friend, As Evergreen's deputy press secretary, I live for newsworthy moments. That's why I was so excited to join my Evergreen colleagues and our partners across the climate movement at the White House on Tuesday to deliver a simple message: **President Biden must stop the Willow project immediately.** [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4412?t=3&akid=13222%2E53494%2EyY4XFX) _Dani, Jamal, and me!_ We delivered more than **100,000** petition signatures to drive that message home—a full **24,565** of which came from Evergreen advocates like you! **On behalf of the whole team, thank you for everything you've done over the last year to help us get to this point.** Together, we raised awareness about this climate disaster, ensured the Biden administration took note, and even [_made_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4413?t=4&akid=13222%2E53494%2EyY4XFX) [ _headlines._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4414?t=5&akid=13222%2E53494%2EyY4XFX) If you want to hear more from me, [_I recorded a quick video from outside the White House._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4412?t=6&akid=13222%2E53494%2EyY4XFX) But above all, I want you to know how much we appreciate you—and how clearly this proves the power of this grassroots movement in the fight for our clean energy future. Onward, Elizabeth Cavalieri
Deputy Press Secretary, Evergreen Action
---

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: See this little kid?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
That’s Ruben (and his buddy Bert).
#

Peter -
See this kid?
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-jan23.jskq5v&refcode=em230113-1-7&t=1&akid=247%2E734936%2Emqej7D)
That’s Ruben (and his buddy Ernie).
He didn’t know it at the time, but there were going to be a lot of nights sleeping on the floor of an apartment because his mother couldn’t afford more.
He didn’t know it at the time, but he’d go on to fight in a war with a unit that saw some of the worst casualties in Iraq.
And he certainly would have never guessed that he’d grow up to become a United States Congressman.
Now that little boy is considering taking on Kyrsten Sinema so he can be a voice for working people in the United States Senate.
Ruben had Ernie with him as a kid. But now he needs you if he’s going to run. What do you say?
[**Can you use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today? The amount isn’t nearly as important as the number of donations we receive if Ruben is going to run against Sinema.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-jan23.jskq5v&refcode=em230113-1-7&t=2&akid=247%2E734936%2Emqej7D)

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: 2023 Will Determine Who Leads Our Cities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
January 13, 2022
Dear friend,
Tennessee Voter Project (TVP) is set up to help make voting accessible to every eligible citizen and support Democratic candidates who are engaging directly with voters and growing our electorate. This year, we’re focusing our attention on municipal races. In terms of the day-to-day challenges of everyday residents, who leads our cities matters almost more than anything else.
As always, TVP will only be supporting candidates who believe that there should be a fair and credible election process, candidates who know that Joe Biden is the President.
Your contribution helps us identify progressive candidates in 2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1] for local office who share your views, and it helps us get more residents registered and ready to vote.
HELP TVP IDENTIFY PROGRESSIVE CANDIDATES IN 2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
This is how we have a real effect on our elections and will help transform our government.
We appreciate your support very much and we hope we can count on you in the future. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Thank you for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: Charles Booker
subject: We broke some real barriers and made historic progress together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

It has been just a few weeks since our historic campaign came to an end.
We might not have received the results we needed to win, but we broke some
real barriers and made historic progress that is critical for our future.

We brought together over half a million regular Kentuckians – from the
Hood to the Holler – to stand up and say that we have had enough. In half
of Kentucky counties, our campaign out-performed the democratic ticket
from 2020. And we did it with a small fraction of the financial support or
media attention.

We never received the big checks my opponent did. We didn’t have the
national support that other Senate candidates enjoyed. And we didn’t have
super PACs and dark money coalescing around our race. But despite all of
that, we had the support of hundreds of thousands of people like you who
decided to stand up and join our movement. For that, I am so grateful and
inspired.

But I’ll be straight with you, Peter. Because we left it all on
the field in the final days of the election, our campaign has some debt to
pay. A combination of unavoidable expenses and missed fundraising goals
have left us with a gap that we need to close in order to close out our
campaign and focus on building the next chapter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18863?t=1001&akid=2891%2E346206%2EgFc_la ]I need your help. If you are able, please consider making a
contribution today.

CHIP IN →

Thank you again for everything you did and continue to do.

I’ll be in touch soon.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230113-2891-footer&t=1002&refcode2=2891_346206_gFc_la&akid=2891%2E346206%2EgFc_la

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2891%2E346206%2EgFc_la

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: There were few better allies than VoteVets in my race — please support them with a contribution if you can

body:
Not only did they run some of the most effective ads of the cycle in Wisconsin, but their Senior Advisor, Alexander Vindman was an unwavering supporter who helped in many facets of the race.
#
Derek -
Since our race ended, I’ve spent a lot of time thanking the volunteers and supporters who supported my campaign.
That brings me to VoteVets.
There were few better allies in my race against Ron Johnson than VoteVets.
Not only did they run some of the most effective ads of the cycle in Wisconsin, but their Senior Advisor, Alexander Vindman was an unwavering supporter who helped in many facets of the race.
But it wasn’t just my race. Look at the House and Senate races that defied expectations and delivered for Democrats and you’ll likely see VoteVets’ involvement.
They are one of the most effective progressive organizations out there, and as they gear up to re-take the House, hold the Senate and keep the presidency in 2024, they need our help. And I am happy to ask:
[**Can you please make a contribution of $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to VoteVets? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and our support helps them do some of the most important work for Democrats. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230113-1-15&t=1&akid=7276%2E3013755%2E3zvKGb)

subject: We don't get a break this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blac Republic
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a9ac17350a&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello Peter,2023 is an incredibly important year for the great state of Virginia. While most of the nation gets a break from elections, our state has elections for our House of Delegates and our State Senate.Yes, that’s right. Election season doesn’t stop here. **We have a job to do and time is of the essence.** As you know, two years ago we flipped Virginia. It was a massive ten-point swing and Governor Glenn Youngkin went straight to VICTORY.Now, we’re going to have to deliver a Republican House of Delegates & Senate to make sure that we can **TRULY** call ourselves a strong red state.We need to win not only for the sake of Virginians, but to change the momentum in this country going into 2024.Blac Republic, my leadership PAC, is going to focus exclusively on pushing great conservative candidates in Virginia for these races.**These are state races, so your money really does go a long way here.** So now I’m calling on you - we need to get our funds ready to truly boost REAL conservatives in primaries so that we’re not dealing with RINOs come the general election.Can I count on you today to help us boost these conservative candidates and help them lead us to victory?
| [DONATE $10](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4eb6ef71b4&e=fdefed58de)

body:

---
**BREAKING NEWS: Trump’s disapproval rating hits an ALL-TIME high!**
_Now that Trump is OFFICIALLY running for president again, we need to know where this grassroots team stands:_
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11616?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230113-TrumpAlert-TrumpDisapprovalAllTimeHigh-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230113-TrumpAlert-TrumpDisapprovalAllTimeHigh-Pros-sl1&akid=9448%2E9716520%2EAhFLO1)
Team -- This is NOT the campaign kickoff Donald Trump thought he'd get.

Just weeks after officially launching his 2024 campaign, Trump's hand-picked candidate suffered a HISTORIC loss in Georgia, and now a new poll shows his **disapproval** rating at 67% -- _**that's an ALL-TIME HIGH!**_

Our strategists need to confirm that Americans are DONE with Trump, so we’re launching an urgent LIVE POLL to find out where Democrats stand **\-- but we’re still waiting for your response, and the poll closes at MIDNIGHT! Please tell us now:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11616?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230113-TrumpAlert-TrumpDisapprovalAllTimeHigh-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230113-TrumpAlert-TrumpDisapprovalAllTimeHigh-Pros-sl1&akid=9448%2E9716520%2EAhFLO1)
Thanks,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

[Photo](https://go.dscc.org/go/1270?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230113-TrumpAlert-TrumpDisapprovalAllTimeHigh-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230113-TrumpAlert-TrumpDisapprovalAllTimeHigh-Pros-sl1&akid=9448%2E9716520%2EAhFLO1) by Gage Skidmore. name: Team Veronica
subject: What Veronica accomplished in December:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/VE_Logo_Web.png]
Hi there - December isn't usually a very busy month on Capitol Hill, but Veronica was working hard for El Pasoans right up until the last days of 2022.

These victories don’t always make the headlines, but we’re proud of them, and we want to share them with you.

secure.actblue.com/donate/ve_email?refcode2=3e3c8666-5793-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&refcode=230113_team_dec_recap_i1 [secure.actblue.com/donate/ve_email?refcode2=3e3c8666-5793-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&refcode=230113_team_dec_recap_i1]

Veronica accomplished all of this last month, and she couldn’t have done it without the support of our grassroots movement.

So thank you, friend. Let’s keep working to build El Paso’s future.

— Team Veronica
Veronica Escobar made history as one of the first Texas Latinas elected to serve in Congress. She's an outspoken advocate for El Paso's progressive values in Washington. That's put a target on her back from Trump supporters who are preparing to spend millions to end her leadership. Can we count on you to stand with Veronica?

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Here’s the truth...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Since day one, this team has been powered by generous folks like you.
#

Friends —
I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution — $3 or whatever you can afford — before our mid-month fundraising deadline ends on Sunday.
Here’s the truth:
Since day one, this team has been powered by generous folks like you who give $5, $10 or even $25 to emails just like this.
And now that we’ve won a full six-year term in the Senate that same support is going to become even more important as we look to tackle critical issues.
And the thing is, if everyone reading this message contributes what they can, we will be able to meet and potentially even surpass our goals in no time.
**So please, I’m humbly asking:**

Lisa Marie Presley [...] READ MORE ]() ---|--- | #### [ Florida Homeowners Forced To Clean Up Cuban Migrant Boat After Government Does Nothing A Florida couple were forced to pay to have a Cuban boat removed from their property after the government took 20 people into custody but left the vessel. Jack Bartkus explained that he was left to deal with the seacraft or either risk a felony, saying, “about 20 people that rode on this boat from [...] READ MORE ]() ---|--- You Might Like | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Last Friday’s deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
Here’s the critical changes we secured.
Here's the critical changes we secured.
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a22ababf7a964c00a40d1527d1781cec&_e=W8MEbc0ZyfSsawfI0sqQSrMhxZ-fuC99ZYOTeXNRSAsabaY6GaY9aJirUdWIAyzRXEwRTAry1FvMNl6KlbAaOqxl1oTvi0ovCre9CdtALnkYYfpjongSNC-f6xK8NoKTI6zGYO6CW_JB9ROEHqV9JGnTGu1VqioJbwB9JzmwwHk5Xwk3Uzdev3XULxrhUXOhiZYJMLSZnEO4CV-I7XCEQtuN23vVTQjfAS1Ek-ggp2al-foxDiGyu-9YWnyLV_GohKdeBQjqJ4TxxgDKbyjxonaYVzjvCmt2Oz3uObsUKVJNCLTfgMhVdqbLjR9pkYuMFp63j8fr0xMJYErI7ZtLBrLEd9oOpUwcHjaVJuiz4GI%3D)
---
Friend,
---
The institution in Washington is broken. Congress doesn't work for the American people, and to be honest, it hasn't in a long time.
---
**Corrupt establishment swamp politicians have repeatedly sold-out hard-working Americans while doling out favors to lobbyists and special interest groups.**
---
In order to effectively fight for YOU over the next two years, we needed to make fundamental, institutional changes to the way that Congress functions.
---
_That 's why I joined 19 of my colleagues to hold the line in the people's House until we secured a deal that accomplished the following: _
---
* Reverses Nancy Pelosi's rule change and returns the House to the 100+ year precedent of allowing a single member to bring up a motion to remove a speaker if they break their promises or betray the American people.

* Promises a vote on term limits and a Texas border security plan.

* Requires single subject bills instead of several thousand-page monstrosities that are full of unrelated provisions and irrelevant nonsense.

* Requires a minimum of 72 hours to read and review the contents of a bill.

* Establishes an investigation into the weaponization of the FBI, DOJ, and other government agencies.

* Holds Biden and Senate Democrats in check by ensuring that debt ceiling increases will be accompanied by reductions in spending.

---
Now, conservatives will be able to truly fight for WE THE PEOPLE with our new House majority.
---
[**Please make a contribution to support us as we hold the line against the Swamp and fight on your behalf in the 118th Congress.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a22ababf7a964c00a40d1527d1781cec&_e=W8MEbc0ZyfSsawfI0sqQSrMhxZ-fuC99ZYOTeXNRSAsabaY6GaY9aJirUdWIAyzRXEwRTAry1FvMNl6KlbAaOqxl1oTvi0ovCre9CdtALnkYYfpjongSNC-f6xK8NoKTI6zGYO6CW_JB9ROEHqV9JGnTGu1VqioJbwB9JzmwwHk5Xwk3Uzdev3XULxrhUXOhiZYJMLSZnEO4CV-I7XCEQh5NJ1jeoBrxF7gE5p-XEivv7lkR13amzW07tn4Jvq6EYO7bf6xHGOpTVSSzgwt_vejbavvXOKXL-OB7sk7iN5ONAn-j9B_xRGwv_bloLV1YPDqJTGce-mE3hA-yS_k2HataQrXcxiR170NVZkelx-0%3D)

Some of the institutional changes we secured may seem small, but they are things that are critical for the House moving forward.
---
After the FBI's illegal and partisan raid on President Trump's home last summer, we've got to pursue investigations to explore possible abuses of power.
---
The motion to vacate rule for the speaker was in place in the House for over a hundred years until Nancy Pelosi changed it, and reinstating it is a huge step towards restoring accountability in Washington.
---
_In the real world, if you lead a company, it only takes one member of the board of directors to hold a vote against the chairman of the board or the CEO._
---
It shouldn't be any different in Congress. Restoring the single-member threshold ensures that any future speaker is fully accountable to the members.
---
_If you want the job of leading the House, then you shouldn 't be afraid of that. _
---
**Requiring single subject bills and a minimum of 72 hours to read and review them are major steps towards transparency and reducing wasteful spending.**
---
Far too often in Washington, various laws, provisions, and funding for dozens of separate, unrelated issues are cobbled together into massive Frankenstein bills.
---
Then, members are only given a few short hours to read them before they're forced to vote yes or no on the entire thing.
---
The recent 4,000+ page omnibus that authorized $1.7 TRILLION in reckless spending is a perfect example of why these rules are desperately needed.
---
These rules changes matter immensely, Friend.
---
_They ultimately dictate how the House functions, and that goes directly to the ability of us accomplishing the solutions that we promised the American people._
---
Things like securing the border, budgetary restraint, and holding the Biden Administration accountable will be much easier to accomplish because of these changes.
---
When I came to Washington, I vowed to stop the destruction being caused by radical far-Left progressives and advance an America First agenda.
---
Last Friday was a massive step towards delivering on that promise.
---
But this was only the beginning. We still have a lot of work to do.
---
To keep up the fight, we're depending on support from grassroots, America First patriots like YOU.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to support us as we hold the line against the Swamp and fight on your behalf in the 118th Congress.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a22ababf7a964c00a40d1527d1781cec&_e=W8MEbc0ZyfSsawfI0sqQSrMhxZ-fuC99ZYOTeXNRSAsabaY6GaY9aJirUdWIAyzRXEwRTAry1FvMNl6KlbAaOqxl1oTvi0ovCre9CdtALnkYYfpjongSNC-f6xK8NoKTI6zGYO6CW_JB9ROEHqV9JGnTGu1VqioJbwB9JzmwwHk5Xwk3Uzdev3XULxrhUXOhiZYJMLSZnEO4CV-I7XCEQg6PfK_QIO-rWOjcgtCR7Nt0vp4Ks1hdOQSrOW6BsxnZPc32WXE4LiVSpLLqIZhyaumylu6D5i8SDk7NUr_eSLRUyDgyS_FnF1T9yyCXzieib4ZnaK2Ao9NFhXQ8LjXMdKdb9iCLD_xjQYu2MShugH0%3D)

clean_body: Here’s the critical changes we secured. Here's the critical changes we secured. | Friend, The institution in Washington is broken. Congress doesn't work for the American people, and to be honest, it hasn't in a long time. Corrupt establishment swamp politicians have repeatedly sold-out hard-working Americans while doling out favors to lobbyists and special interest groups. In order to effectively fight for YOU over the next two years, we needed to make fundamental, institutional changes to the way that Congress functions. That 's why I joined 19 of my colleagues to hold the line in the people's House until we secured a deal that accomplished the following: Reverses Nancy Pelosi's rule change and returns the House to the 100+ year precedent of allowing a single member to bring up a motion to remove a speaker if they break their promises or betray the American people. Promises a vote on term limits and a Texas border security plan. Requires single subject bills instead of several thousand-page monstrosities that are full of unrelated provisions and irrelevant nonsense. Requires a minimum of 72 hours to read and review the contents of a bill. Establishes an investigation into the weaponization of the FBI, DOJ, and other government agencies. Holds Biden and Senate Democrats in check by ensuring that debt ceiling increases will be accompanied by reductions in spending. Now, conservatives will be able to truly fight for WE THE PEOPLE with our new House majority. Some of the institutional changes we secured may seem small, but they are things that are critical for the House moving forward. After the FBI's illegal and partisan raid on President Trump's home last summer, we've got to pursue investigations to explore possible abuses of power. The motion to vacate rule for the speaker was in place in the House for over a hundred years until Nancy Pelosi changed it, and reinstating it is a huge step towards restoring accountability in Washington. In the real world, if you lead a company, it only takes one member of the board of directors to hold a vote against the chairman of the board or the CEO. It shouldn't be any different in Congress. Restoring the single-member threshold ensures that any future speaker is fully accountable to the members. If you want the job of leading the House, then you shouldn 't be afraid of that. Requiring single subject bills and a minimum of 72 hours to read and review them are major steps towards transparency and reducing wasteful spending. Far too often in Washington, various laws, provisions, and funding for dozens of separate, unrelated issues are cobbled together into massive Frankenstein bills. Then, members are only given a few short hours to read them before they're forced to vote yes or no on the entire thing. The recent 4,000+ page omnibus that authorized $1.7 TRILLION in reckless spending is a perfect example of why these rules are desperately needed. These rules changes matter immensely, Friend. They ultimately dictate how the House functions, and that goes directly to the ability of us accomplishing the solutions that we promised the American people. Things like securing the border, budgetary restraint, and holding the Biden Administration accountable will be much easier to accomplish because of these changes. When I came to Washington, I vowed to stop the destruction being caused by radical far-Left progressives and advance an America First agenda. Last Friday was a massive step towards delivering on that promise. But this was only the beginning. We still have a lot of work to do. To keep up the fight, we're depending on support from grassroots, America First patriots like YOU. Thank you, Rep. Byron Donalds FL-19 Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress. 2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260, Naples, FL 34108 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4614a1b18a4426db60a3b901cf60d47&_e=POuBbzUfJFWetJVtyitDMPJXnFfagvlTQGc1FqrKOad_F53DwyPIUceLrOe1VaTDsvB3YEzqCpWq8PFAH5jpkBmCRDbqaeaXvppqSmoq54y_ury0o-D3nQxagIwPV1PQL3EsBH9en8aHZNjETnZlvrowogVcXoxrs0YZq3cV8KSD_vM6pX6dfuOLb4cihs_vvM_lfnhTeSOScBTTNPiqhqneP9-7x-NZSyq0YwgueVyl53bfYOUCjEWdziEJ1NBDCZtXGBqAp1jSHb9CfYwRxdB01hhCNegYL1ejWey4qbmDb5Ja9dJU1bvLu0eaqO8ncJV4dLDOgIuebafbicamfbfepXSx2ONR7gq4JnPVvl0%3D)

| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4614a1b18a4426db60a3b901cf60d47&_e=POuBbzUfJFWetJVtyitDMPJXnFfagvlTQGc1FqrKOad_F53DwyPIUceLrOe1VaTDsvB3YEzqCpWq8PFAH5jpkBmCRDbqaeaXvppqSmoq54y_ury0o-D3nQxagIwPV1PQL3EsBH9en8aHZNjETnZlvrowogVcXoxrs0YZq3cV8KSD_vM6pX6dfuOLb4cihs_vvM_lfnhTeSOScBTTNPiqhjVowt9wINSYd7nPeUgZRMR8mJ7lpzQXHQl4ptvfomyvxEMAQdOKpMQHvHfozqlNZ9ehmwOxPxDkiFAr_kwWNEN13nYprGzHu7SMqG8tk6c_eO4qpU0qyZCHPhSZz6CbPIayPf0xc-m-iuVS26a3kvI%3D)_

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4614a1b18a4426db60a3b901cf60d47&_e=POuBbzUfJFWetJVtyitDMPJXnFfagvlTQGc1FqrKOad_F53DwyPIUceLrOe1VaTDsvB3YEzqCpWq8PFAH5jpkBmCRDbqaeaXvppqSmoq54y_ury0o-D3nQxagIwPV1PQL3EsBH9en8aHZNjETnZlvrowogVcXoxrs0YZq3cV8KSD_vM6pX6dfuOLb4cihs_vvM_lfnhTeSOScBTTNPiqhmaPlZPQWTH9F2o1nxSPFm2QxMPdzWXqPl7fOr2MSaeReP6qwYnNajsQs2FBQ25F_qzK2sxQf8onoLsRDW-oqMdCI-a7uVBRe5uMiwUEmQMT6QEQhm4WQwP9gXxIWqfC2bOrkzd5fik0d_gkvbBc7lA%3D)

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week I signed onto articles of impeachment against Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas for his dereliction of duty, lies, and direct responsibility for the unprecedented crisis on our southern border. I also called for a full Congressional investigation into Joe Biden's mishandling of classified materials and exposed the left's hypocrisy on this issue.
Below you'll find links to sign petitions calling for the impeachment of Secretary Mayorkas and an investigation into Joe Biden.
As always, thank you for your support.
Here's your brief:

| This week, I signed onto articles of impeachment for Alejandro Mayorkas. His mishandling of the border crisis has led to an undeniable disaster.
He lied to Congress, absurdly claiming our border is 'secure.' He threw Border Patrol agents under the bus, lying about 'whipping' migrants. He ignored pleas for help from border communities and CBP agents.
Mayorkas has shown time and time again that he is not qualified to serve. He has blatantly violated his constitutional oath and duty to secure our nation from hostile threats. It's sheer incompetence at best, or negligence at worst. The American people deserve a Homeland Security Secretary who will actually do the job.
Republicans promised accountability when we took back the House. This is the ultimate way to deliver on that promise in a response to a crisis that has threatened our national sovereignty and rule of law.
[SIGN THE PETITION. DEMAND IMPEACHMENT OF ALEJANDRO MAYORKAS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017bY1p3g2vtYogK_SwbF4TWiir7UDfiSC_PJ1N6XByV_jspg-_hD1YgA2uYFyHe4XO77VLJqOhWGM1dyjw4QSpizZ6ADhoFKr5bQLWg1StNnZ39pNdk03TtamSKnk__6Pct-8XUY0OOKVfFIP7VAHT2iW3tjbJaX-Q0BdGtV80JoKvb-6_pQmZ1U_kMKOefHtLKvmbnELhOjTlhrSGuR5wsWUEtX_zbSOcZNul9ERLzC4zRVT1t0f8HCiRtd-d441SbA2o-sq_Q-S2DV_4AOp1ipIImnEkg-TH3w1hRcodwwlYufZrergXbijv5RaFBOk4gGJuZdEynfEgh12cB-fJMxmqMgxgBKSbrMUSeZacsN_UUPgNVvXuw==&c=jCl_bgoe61UHwtORYHBAldnjTsORQxlE6UxgLYZZWlxXvGNTn6KMcg==&ch=lndeH4VIfcpbvwlJbnF0jzcSammqM3lGzK7pSwxw90OnJivP_g4MQg==)

| SHAMELESS HYPOCRISY

| Joe Biden's handling of classified documents is very different from President Trump's.
It's much, much worse.
First, we learned Biden kept classified materials at his think tank that is described as a ["dark-money, revolving door nightmare where foreign competitors like China donated millions of dollars to the university so that they could have access to future high-ranking officials."](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017bY1p3g2vtYogK_SwbF4TWiir7UDfiSC_PJ1N6XByV_jspg-_hD1YgA2uYFyHe4X_Z3N7pd1f6kUmzuvJB3aE7KcBngjmdW9IebJLIq5gV4LDUqMfhTNn4L24GNWSqfD9u3gzpHKlYSB1p6cxaF9JmJsqwokmVBTNNw3S8pCKjtAM7leT4hW8H9zks5fWcXgcVqdU6cZw0OH5b4jtgEjq3JrZiHqUWUIB-fZ6bzrHBV-dBGnZvDa-A==&c=jCl_bgoe61UHwtORYHBAldnjTsORQxlE6UxgLYZZWlxXvGNTn6KMcg==&ch=lndeH4VIfcpbvwlJbnF0jzcSammqM3lGzK7pSwxw90OnJivP_g4MQg==)
Now, we learn that Biden kept additional classified materials at his home in Delaware in his GARAGE.
Yet there was no raid. No ransacking of Biden's home. Nothing. This is hypocrisy at the highest level and it's dangerous.
This week the Department of Justice announced the appointment of a special counsel to investigate the mishandling of classified documents. That's a good first step, but it must be supplemented by a full-scale congressional investigation.
I am committed to making sure that happens.
[SIGN THE PETITION FOR A FULL-SCALE INVESTIGATION INTO BIDEN'S MISHANDLING OF CLASSIFIED MATERIALS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017bY1p3g2vtYogK_SwbF4TWiir7UDfiSC_PJ1N6XByV_jspg-_hD1YgA2uYFyHe4XfMtSUbZ5NRTCur-_X2PCQrZJG02gvdpaqrHeI1AmMwOYvvGkN49EBCca9APj-kTD-qjbavfnaQBD5LZzS-JhLlhKL6-95NTQ0e_yWwUjCNlIzrw2S-vxJGul2QAE02oBcE6lTTxZATCo2dIHM20LngnHi8SaVjhEFrQ5jau5m0JxhSpHKu2jrkToKsdUhdQuLXCVuF-xkupEDB7A6b5PlLDvnO0QVAKhTWUf6xnV3zwA6-OKnOMXi1BjifzHiVOIisOKeAoDbqD5LVinm--hW-Xncc0izH2pGYgT4DFpNBzY0818idgFlA==&c=jCl_bgoe61UHwtORYHBAldnjTsORQxlE6UxgLYZZWlxXvGNTn6KMcg==&ch=lndeH4VIfcpbvwlJbnF0jzcSammqM3lGzK7pSwxw90OnJivP_g4MQg==)

I also called for a full Congressional investigation into Joe Biden's mishandling of classified materials and exposed the left's hypocrisy on this issue. | | Friend, **Have a 2A Task Force New Year! ** The holiday season focuses on the things that truly matter - God, family, and our country. The 2A Task Force focuses on defending one of our most essential constitutional rights, the right to keep and bear arms, and highlights the importance of not complying. Despite the Biden administration and the radical left’s mission to rewrite our Constitution, our mission is to reinforce and protect us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. The 2A Task Force is led by one of the country’s most respected voices on the Second Amendment, Donald Trump Jr. He recognized an opportunity to better organize pro-second amendment efforts and already succeeded once by sinking Biden’s radical anti-gun lobbyist nomination to lead the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, **but now we need your HELP!**
