name: United Rural Democrats
subject: The first 100 days are crucial, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Congress needs a plan ASAP. | | | Hi Peter – The proceedings that resulted in Kevin McCarthy being elected as Speaker of the House were the most embarrassing, prolonged, and outrageous spectacle of democracy in over 100 years. Republicans wasted the entire first week of the 118th Congress to elect a man who is squarely beholden to the far right fringes of his party. **It took 15 ballots for the madness to end.** But make no mistake, this chaos will continue as long as the Speaker of the House is Kevin McCarthy. That's why United Rural Democrats is committed to electing representatives who serve the American people, not right-wing extremists or their own egos. Republicans will use their**first 100 days of a majority to prioritize policies and their agenda**. We know that their agenda will set us back in time and roll back the progress we worked so hard to make over the last couple of years. The best way to stop them? Run, run, run. We got to recruit and support candidates in every zip code, especially in rural America. **[Will you chip in $5 or more to help Democrats get a head start on rebuilding our majority? We're just a few seats away from taking it back.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gc0zZXQuP5iaFLRM2K0eGWMmyNE57eZmx_nRa0sW_oC1fpRCk6cEsigScTMUNfKpHRrNHAQ6VBEw0E0Jan4snGnkirWzxHAbyuGzT6gvXYSmPXjwsgzSVKhRcyXFSEXmibg6DHb6xH435FpAS1Xz115R8gC9rwbY0rqtQ5m-T1tOu-KmYGrISi5iSZ1OcnAS11XCYJoQxUei2Q-w7kjFFxYkm6aooGEBO_g8bezDv5qa5R3QfxT-jkKj2tlJDat1vAKcFaPg03ju54pkpQtnJv16Mqnrrs_u47wMv3rYHy0SsRvTDAvPgvCIYzxLV2vcCrxpXzAdMSgbP6OClffCqgiSG6sv5t8WZICVj4gQ41WQggasQM6ODU9U9X12og0EVTb8S1qvcIkPkIUNSZSMwx8w/3st/VWLNdj-aSIO-H3aJwGlJtA/h0/E_8KTT_9cCnhXM-8qZ1PG8enpCyBAX5B6P0blLsu2yc)** **[Chip in here****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcoLq2tFKFVFVvpFSunRO0odOGyAE6nh3u-o998pZhcUo7OGHfYbjMszv9_9AGsnVHZa6mnHjxdUpG58g8sTYnlPtVjdXnvHxQ_9dCA-hgS7fBrUKC3xDHwZPSRC5G-dI8pthsYSYz1flnx8sXHcQIp9HrnU2AHp6co3K4y3FpKSWnym7fkG9f36knWW6Kq8FOZpj-fygnxg2nO83m4OdO2j4oudY2qgY7zABBfTvns_ypidzpOPLQQFbUEOLq_ERiHhDHuuYhnlU1yAlfVrXqFTBn5BOyvFmp9RtdzN9KzwL_CROxbOi8ty4SVAZ_sbYcQtYM6Q_so2L4wgYrojd33fADhHgCXD2QKaaKRHpUXddyb7jeYD159GW9PMChfqqY/3st/VWLNdj-aSIO-H3aJwGlJtA/h1/fjzFVe9baCFuMuUHUTW8dGpY6xdaBRzPFk8kwxVCN7s)** Thank you, Peter, for your support. \-- United Rural Democrats

| | | **This may be the stupidest idea yet from Congressional Republicans -- "[Un-impeaching](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e30a65d-e8aa-4802-996e-ee103026af45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)" Trump:**

_House Speaker Kevin McCarthy (R-Calif.) said Thursday that he's willing to take a look at expunging an impeachment of former president Donald Trump by the Democratic-led House... In the previous Congress, groups of Republicans floated resolutions to expunge both impeachments. Supporters of the latter included Rep. Elise Stefanik (N.Y.), the Republican conference chairwoman. " ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td86ddc61-611f-4427-bf4a-e9e660c0c709/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_

Trump was impeached twice, both times for good reasons. And Republicans can't undo history, just to appease their disgraced and delusional leader.

[**Add your name, and tell Republicans: "No, you can't 'un-impeach' Trump"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T040ad2a7-27fa-4795-949f-28094bb69847/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Peter, over the past few years, supporters like you have helped secure some HUGE victories for Georgia Democrats:
**2020:**

For the first time in **nearly three decades** , Democrats won Georgia’s Electoral College votes, helping defeat Donald Trump and elect President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris.

**2021:**

_First_ , we elected **both Reverend Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff** in crucial run-off elections, delivering the Senate majority to Democrats.

_Then_ , Georgia Democrats expanded their leadership in local government by flipping control of **more than 40 municipal seats** across the state, including several mayorships and crucial city council seats.

**2022:**

In what was supposed to be a “red wave” year, we **re-elected Reverend Raphael Warnock** and helped _expand_ Democratic control of the Senate!

**2023:**

**We continue to expand on our success and flip MORE municipal seats across the state

OR

The GOP flips Georgia back to red, and all our success grinds to a halt.

_That’s up to you!_**
| [Donate now to help Georgia Democrats win](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57281639/387430197/747325640?amount=10&refcode=20220113.1_GADems_1L&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDIwNTAxZS02MDkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RsSSpGL8hGOZx5gvPOQT2jJWsmJjdopWtJIM1CE2h_I=)

✅ Invest in **continued voter education and registration** to make sure Democrats across the state are active, engaged, and ready to cast a ballot in the next election.

✅ Create **structural organization** to prepare a strong turnout machine ahead of 2024 — and for upcoming local races up and down the ballot!

✅ Combat **millions in dark money spending from out-of-state right-wing donors** who are determined to flip our state back to red.
[**_Our work to make Georgia a SOLID BLUE STATE is just getting started, Peter! name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: This is shocking, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, I wanted to come to you first. My team just briefed me on our finances and... I’m getting concerned.
My staff showed me the comparison between our fundraising numbers this time last year and now -- and Peter, the difference is honestly shocking. **According to our records, we’re actually down 70% from January 2022. Now we’re facing our first term with a GOP majority and the situation is urgent -- we have to stay strong.**
We’re just 11 days into 2023, and already we’re looking at a gap of about $8,700. But if we can make that up, we’ll be back on track and in a better position in this new Congressional session.
70% is a BIG difference, so we set a deadline to raise that $8,700 and close that gap 48 hours from now. [**I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important -- so can I count on your donation to get us back on track for 2023?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25692?refcode=em20230113-2054&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2054%2E420207%2E9mAa92)
**[Chip in »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25692?refcode=em20230113-2054&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2054%2E420207%2E9mAa92)**
From the very start, our campaign has always been powered by donations from a growing grassroots community nationwide. Most of the contributions that we receive from emails like this one are under $27 -- **our average now is just $20.80.**
One donation of $27 might not seem like it would make a difference, but trust me, every dollar truly adds up – the numbers don’t lie. I am worried about our drop in fundraising, but I’ve seen our movement move mountains.
[**I believe we will make up for this rough patch with support from our people like you -- if you can pitch in $27, or any amount, to help us meet our urgent 48-hour deadline, I would greatly appreciate it.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25692?refcode=em20230113-2054&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2054%2E420207%2E9mAa92)
**[Chip in $27»](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25700?refcode=em20230113-2054&t=22&akid=2054%2E420207%2E9mAa92)**
Remember, we’re in this fight together.
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230113-2054-footer&t=23&refcode2=2054_420207_9mAa92&akid=2054%2E420207%2E9mAa92)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2054%2E420207%2E9mAa92)

body:
I need you on my team.

Peter,
---
Americans like you made sure their voice was heard by electing a new Republican House majority this past November.
---
And as we begin a new year dedicated to getting our country back on track there isn’t anyone I’d rather have joining my team than YOU.
---
That’s why I’m asking you to renew your Sustaining Membership for the 2023 calendar year.
---
[**Please make a contribution of any amount to become a 2023 Sustaining Member and join our fight to get our country back on track.**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=afe1d5c0ba83436ba64fd5a06156db70&_e=T1gnRjhTi5z-4GSKec0J2-y88nThPg3C7bLkvDqgv66ZoGubWpkDn3lDtNZ3dIOaDBHvk54Ht-8xgMAe0knEwYG_0rasic4RrVUFAdKMvpcp9ayu1r7TkrpLX06nnpX3vspSq0ekmz-l0pt0GkiL8wMnlcd495PRTeEalnWSRwhgAyx5h7VreOWClwIg1VXf19Z0vHnfVU3uHYizgpkUHMx7fpG8yOSf1qawGfxYzeoInVKaShRhuZ6xGr2G2a7ouWeDaA_ES6-cHlrdVUS4jLhpaCUOZomABf7j338ToE9HGPZ1GtNB5YtvrkwSIGoZ3VXKR8i8Ro_1H6vrT_RgPEDyg6xrxieu0XrZZR3B_IQ%3D)
---

[RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=afe1d5c0ba83436ba64fd5a06156db70&_e=T1gnRjhTi5z-4GSKec0J2-y88nThPg3C7bLkvDqgv66ZoGubWpkDn3lDtNZ3dIOaDBHvk54Ht-8xgMAe0knEwYG_0rasic4RrVUFAdKMvpcp9ayu1r7TkrpLX06nnpX3vspSq0ekmz-l0pt0GkiL8wMnlcd495PRTeEalnWSRwhgAyx5h7VreOWClwIg1VXf19Z0vHnfVU3uHYizgpkUHIeSVIpK90XI1GXnpgaOgoJ2wA_FPE6ZVBH6hYiI4vkeBKCf8KYqSPsu6AnweDKzwUBxbZ11rKVdx_iKbBWMD27PCym7oHVpOrzXwqz9v8RbKNm9vl4XMLo3M61YSkLXN-sy7x7SWhMqOTYZv6Tppbk%3D)
---

The dedication and unrelenting support of patriots like you helped ensure we took back the House and ended Nancy Pelosi’s reign.
---
And now we are in the perfect position to defend America from Joe Biden and the Left’s disastrous agenda.
---
_I will always fight for this country and for you against the leftist policies that have decimated our economy, left our borders wide open, erased our energy independence, and made us a laughingstock on the world stage._
---
And with Republicans now in control of the House, the real work to build a better America begins.
---
And by officially joining our 2023 team, you can be an integral part of our country’s bright future.
---
[**So please, make a contribution of any amount to become a 2023 Sustaining Member and join our fight to get our country back on track.**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=afe1d5c0ba83436ba64fd5a06156db70&_e=T1gnRjhTi5z-4GSKec0J2-y88nThPg3C7bLkvDqgv66ZoGubWpkDn3lDtNZ3dIOaDBHvk54Ht-8xgMAe0knEwYG_0rasic4RrVUFAdKMvpcp9ayu1r7TkrpLX06nnpX3vspSq0ekmz-l0pt0GkiL8wMnlcd495PRTeEalnWSRwhgAyx5h7VreOWClwIg1VXf19Z0vHnfVU3uHYizgpkUHIMx1eUhwWUC-GYbIfy7Cavmro1aqWo3dB7g9h_GwWKiuEU0MuvTNUd-7vYkxnVCnGV91nyccSXjRmDyIGvAt__3w629Za2jUagsAr_lsKvL8ecchhxS_SQcI2zUxjZxlr48wm-J1KUcc3VwbMApGvU%3D)

And now we are in the perfect position to defend America from Joe Biden and the Left’s disastrous agenda. I will always fight for this country and for you against the leftist policies that have decimated our economy, left our borders wide open, erased our energy independence, and made us a laughingstock on the world stage. And with Republicans now in control of the House, the real work to build a better America begins. And by officially joining our 2023 team, you can be an integral part of our country’s bright future. Thank you, Rep. Scott Fitzgerald Wisconsin's 5th Congressional District Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress Po Box 5048 Elm Grove, WI 53122

name: The Giffords Team
subject: A gun safety victory in Illinois
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We applaud Illinois lawmakers for having the courage to act
#

Friends -
Earlier this week, we won a victory for the gun safety movement in Illinois with the passage of the Protect Illinois Communities Act.
With this bill, lawmakers passed legislation that will prohibit assault weapons and high-capacity magazines, ban devices that can turn semi-automatic weapons into machine guns, strengthen the state’s Firearm Restraining Order law, and address illegal gun trafficking in Illinois.
We applaud Illinois lawmakers for having the courage to act. Now, we need other states across the country to take the same steps to make sure weapons of war are not easily accessible to people who shouldn’t have them.
As of now, only eight states and the District of Columbia have laws to prevent the sale, manufacturing, and distribution of assault weapons.
[**Will you contribute to Giffords today so we can continue our work towards a future with an assault weapons ban at the federal level?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230113-1-15&t=1&akid=4041%2E3935704%2EY2ORlz)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-jan23.C46tVD&refcode=em230113-1-15&t=20&akid=4041%2E3935704%2EY2ORlz)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-jan23.7iD0Mu&refcode=em230113-1-15&t=21&akid=4041%2E3935704%2EY2ORlz)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jan23.5RCsE0&refcode=em230113-1-15&t=22&akid=4041%2E3935704%2EY2ORlz)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jan23.CbkSJK&refcode=em230113-1-15&t=23&akid=4041%2E3935704%2EY2ORlz)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jan23.bUZFep&refcode=em230113-1-15&t=24&akid=4041%2E3935704%2EY2ORlz)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan23.4kE3Tp&refcode=em230113-1-15&t=25&akid=4041%2E3935704%2EY2ORlz)**
---
****
Weapons of war don’t belong in our communities. Far too often, they fall into the wrong hands and are used in mass shooting events.
After last summer’s shooting in Highland Park, Illinois legislators took necessary, transformative action to keep their constituents safe.
Now, we must continue working towards a future where assault weapons are off the streets in every community in our nation. [**Please, donate today to help us keep working to make this vision a reality.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230113-1-15&t=26&akid=4041%2E3935704%2EY2ORlz)
\- The Giffords Team

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4041%2E3935704%2EY2ORlz) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: I need your help to reach more Kentuckians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
The KY governor’s race is heating up. Peter,

As you may know, I've officially filed my paperwork to run for re-election, and the race is well underway.

Each day, my administration shows up and goes to bat for the people of Kentucky. Together, we work to better the lives of our community members and move our commonwealth forward.

I want to ensure we can maintain this progress for at least four more years – but we're in for a tough re-election race this year. My opponents are working around the clock to raise money, and **one of them already went on the airwaves with a huge six-figure ad buy.** They want to undo the progress we've made for Kentucky, so we can't waste any time responding.

clean_body: The KY governor’s race is heating up. Peter, As you may know, I've officially filed my paperwork to run for re-election, and the race is well underway. Each day, my administration shows up and goes to bat for the people of Kentucky. Together, we work to better the lives of our community members and move our commonwealth forward. I want to ensure we can maintain this progress for at least four more years – but we're in for a tough re-election race this year. My opponents are working around the clock to raise money, and one of them already went on the airwaves with a huge six-figure ad buy. They want to undo the progress we've made for Kentucky, so we can't waste any time responding. We need to reach folks in every corner of Kentucky with our message, so my team set a goal to raise $50,000 to be able to fight back.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = = | = | = I can’t thank you enough for your support. subject: We can’t lose Kirsten’s voice in the Senate

body:
Kirsten Gillibrand is officially running for reelection to keep New York’s critical Senate seat blue, and she needs our urgent help.
| | |
---
Friend, Kirsten Gillibrand is officially running for reelection to keep New York’s critical Senate seat blue, and she needs our urgent help.

After New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in two decades, the state very nearly went red. Now, there’s no question that the GOP is going to target Kirsten for defeat in 2024. But as Democrats fight to protect our razor-thin majority, her race is one we simply cannot afford to lose.

[So please, will you donate $3 or more right now — split between Kirsten Gillibrand and me — to defeat the GOP in New York and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57283207/387436067/-1340488001?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2183-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTU1MjFiZS02MzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D6Vn4yx39zfUWWLhtO_3BMRClW4vt3Lu-QEmS-sDef8=)

On the front line of every important fight our country is facing, you’ll find Kirsten — and she doesn’t let up until she gets the job done. Standing up for everything from our health care to our most fundamental rights, Kirsten is tough, determined, and relentless.

With so many critical fights ahead of us to create better futures for families across our country, we need Kirsten’s voice in the Senate. And if there’s one thing I know after winning tough elections myself, it’s that early investments from grassroots supporters like you are absolutely critical.

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: The Left is now attacking me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Democrats see the 20 House Conservatives as a threat.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203138:J8hRX-GNS:m:1:3331421248:775487CFA07A3B86C98BFAD0295B2EF3:r)
---
Peter,
---
Democrats and the liberal media have been attacking me for being one of the 20 House members who fought for a conservative agenda.
---
**They 've called me an extremist, a fake Latina, a witch, and a white supremacist. **
---
_But their attacks won 't stop me from voting for secure borders, defunding the 87,000 new IRS agents, and an end to out-of-control spending bills that light your money on fire. _
---
This is my first time ever in Congress - or in public office at all!
---
...And it only took a few days for me to become hated by the entire Democrat machine. I can only imagine how much they'll attack me in the weeks and months to come.
---
[**Please make a contribution to defend me from the wild and outrageous attacks being manufactured by the Democrat machine now that they see me as a threat.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203138:J8hRX-GNS:m:1:3331421248:775487CFA07A3B86C98BFAD0295B2EF3:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203138:J8hRX-GNS:m:1:3331421248:775487CFA07A3B86C98BFAD0295B2EF3:r)
---

As reported by _Fox News_ :
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203138:J8hRX-GNS:m:1:3331421248:775487CFA07A3B86C98BFAD0295B2EF3:r)
---

Our conservative deal has won praise from Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, Steve Bannon, Lou Dobbs, and many more.
---

**_FOX NEWS: Kelly Craft vows ‘full-court press’ to combat China’s fentanyl ‘abuses’_**
---
Friend, Did you know that according to the Drug Enforcement Agency, China continues to be the primary source of fentanyl being imported into the United States. This deadly drug is shipped straight from China into Mexico where it can be smuggled right across our open southern border,** killing more than 100 Americans every day?** Kentucky lost more than 2,000 precious lives to overdoses in 2022, of which 73% were specifically due to fentanyl. And yet Governor Beshear did not even mention the crisis in his State of the Commonwealth address. We need leaders who are listening to us and addressing the problems plaguing our commonwealth. **Kelly Craft is the only candidate for governor listening to Kentuckians and understands the urgency needed to address the fentanyl pandemic.**
---
[**Join our Movement**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/347a86b103a699c67c94c760ea83e7c0/41823/17e95f31313f434c/f5fcdeebfed95303c3d6b838967d376c/41823)

The race for the White House in 2024 is already underway, friend.

Despite being impeached TWICE and possibly facing criminal charges from the Justice Department for his role in the Jan. 6 attack on our nation,** Donald Trump has launched his 2024 presidential campaign.**

**Meanwhile, President Biden is working hard for American families. In just two years as president, Biden has:**
* Made historic investments in our nation's infrastructure
* Signed protections for same-sex marriage into law
* Created 10 million jobs (and counting!)
* And so much more!

We know the 2024 presidential campaign will be a tough fight – nearly 47% of the country voted for Trump in 2020. That's why American Bridge is reaching out to TOP Democrats like you to get your thoughts as we determine our strategy for the months ahead.

But with this poll set to expire at midnight, we're still missing your response, friend. Tell us, if the 2024 presidential election were today, who would you vote for?

name: Katie Hill
subject: We’re building a lasting movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57301586/387479363/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjIwNTZkMTItOGY5My1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BuEM3jOz1xmV9bUKCnl2YXSZ1SN4vm0niXxUFOlRLCs=)
---
I’m going to be honest with you, Peter: Our fundraising has taken a significant dip since the election last year. And the thing is, I get it. Folks check out of politics for a bit right after an election. But the fact is, there is no off season for us. We work 24/7, year-round, in order to secure wins for our endorsed candidates and our legislative priorities. When our supporters check out, it means we have fewer resources to get the job done. [_**That’s why today I’m asking you to commit to a monthly donation to HER Time. name: Senator Dick Durbin
subject: Confirming more judges in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
This is some of the most important work we do in the Senate.
#
Peter,
It was my honor to chair the Senate Judiciary Committee during the last session of Congress.
I am proud of what we accomplished. Namely, we confirmed 97 of President Biden’s federal judicial nominees, outpacing Presidents Trump and Obama in their first two years.
These outstanding judges bring an unprecedented amount of diversity to the bench. **Now, I am looking forward to leading the Judiciary Committee once again and continuing to expand on our success.**
The way I see it, confirming these highly-qualified judges is some of the most important work we do in the Senate. Democrats will continue to prioritize confirming President Biden’s nominees to serve on the federal bench — and thanks to your work to preserve and expand our majority, we are in an even stronger position to keep this momentum going as we return to Washington.
**[Will you contribute $5 or more right now to support our Senate Democratic majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57284861/387442553/1234795486?refcode=dd_em_230113_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDVkMzFmNC02ODkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VUN4LnJC_c0kOT9UlsnjIPrsC_9ZQjSYU5PvVFZzJt0=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Terrifying headline - Kari Lake as Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, Two more polls this week show that Kyrsten Sinema is on track to lose badly if she runs for re-election to the Senate. Yay! But here’s the scary part: in a three-way race between Sinema, a Democrat (like Ruben Gallego), and a Republican (like Kari Lake, ugh) - Sinema takes enough votes from the Democrat to throw the election to a Republican. And that’s how we get headlines like this: [**Chip in now to make sure a Democratic candidate - NOT Sinema, and NOT a Republican has all the support they need to win this Senate seat for Arizona >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcFaPhWsIDdanmCdGMfh4tdOz71BKWllZacyr2-2OG11Rf_cPuCjxuriYzWprxoXDQORa7FgOFW30xsUHSLmcLo25uRZoTM2VTV4v7-GPT41CHY3nlsiB_EHOjzJoniBz4DLlZA-ycnQ0EumBPJJ-UKBd4b3jyk3Z7ipIa0FqTTL-YVcAP7YfydXEqngzyNbWsZQuRzP2R2zAg3oYIiFZYMNRo1TIkZwJ7gVBMg8uuAvuVPBO8EQkSX1twjMN7_Oargbrx-k--pElvTcpjUDRwXD5YG5Zkia58vi5OtrkD6WjUEoDTbQtqGWUbuuQdw37BO2kJMrwk7NhCg8jWcP1-fg/3st/KQaPkf3VQ9meL8tcbEs7fQ/h0/yyO404tU7bni29y7bWVk_HJs-fJ1aLxO3wk2QrZjir8) Arizona deserves better than Kyrsten Sinema, and Arizona deserves *way* better than Kari Lake or whoever else the Republicans nominate. That’s why our job has to be to show voters how terrible Sinema is, so that she doesn’t take too many votes from the Democratic nominee – and it’s why we must unite behind the eventual Democratic nominee so that he or she can win a three-way race. When Sinema decided to leave the Democratic party, she made a conscious decision to abandon the voters and volunteers and Democratic infrastructure that helped elect her – in favor of continuing to rely on her big money corporate donors and sucking up to Republicans. That strategy is working *terribly* for her. But it’s working just enough that it’s taking voters away from the Democrat. We need to nip that in the bud, right now. That’s why we’re going to do everything we can, right now, to show voters that Sinema’s out for herself, not Arizona – and that she’s not deserving of any votes that would otherwise go to a true Democratic candidate. Together, we’re going to elect a Senator who won't forget where they came from and who will work to represent Arizona–NOT Wall Street and special interests. [**Please chip in to keep our work going >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcFaPhWsIDdanmCdGMfh4tdD3tfbo8r9uZkJDj6n_w1yMH7lSf1OpyY-8G8wzkcDvQi_5pm2qJZ6lJKlTTwb4q3JL1EDZR_4pKpDtYOS03_7EvlSIjazeKwYkHkHzTMYOmn-z5HpPuRAIWKpNsUBrcyNGqwwAyJBzRcgh5MslrpePALTzl31HdCHWl1dnrVr_akDsmjHkrHzgxXf1QfZHnTu_UT98Bty4ORARA9KEecjFq0gKbSG_PocZ2KFRLKXlLeAwzQGHmVsWS9k3QBB6uKORfs6CWFJoX03QDm6h8IoCZRb442L_3L0KPo7OdbfA0-Fs2NXgdbBQf7rFzx_N--g/3st/KQaPkf3VQ9meL8tcbEs7fQ/h1/zcwBw0qZLbiqYgSbVulkoSLTMtpYjLnl6zjX0kWGTTE) [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcFaPhWsIDdanmCdGMfh4tdOXEP9balqscD4S64-L0LsnuVUJZu5IXjGc9Q0ttVnHNV9QMcPtgBbCgdhvvY0HnEWoIIZ---q9EdjtxTCJJP5QBH1z-fSxZZTmyNVQOYr4qrESzAyjHEqCJQlTj_IvHAJLT-sWSOYHmObSDy9OLx8N-NOOkHYQpqQxqg4g81F_leYZtCbh1FTe0PNjGDo6qu3PSlRLynyQE7b7fxriNjPY8l_4VlVFqYFKsQ3I5eW9b_KrdB1V5-WEdvVFAAZzBfHb36QqP7qRuxYmDoWunRrh1Jn_csTSuQy-PWPFas845xv54X83rh0NX13T5eY6mmA/3st/KQaPkf3VQ9meL8tcbEs7fQ/h2/KUvyQSSN7cUJMtIxlP0VCDWcjCfmgrpGzGMCuSW950Q) Thanks for all your help,
-Replace Sinema Project & Change for Arizona 2024

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5lpu2jn1qfkp9ll5lh676o2u7in5k835i7700no_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdgm9o70cjh2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqbo5bmvdvtilab2vr5rmsqmqkdp13cd16ggii20_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdgm9o70cjh2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zudgmhs8p299r9t9eavgh9k7ur2qjbg3tj2flhq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdgm9o70cjh2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgco71trdjnkdh5vv44jdg2t3dh8jdkslvtv1r20_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdgm9o70cjh2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z40tp4m9k5h3vg1ef9e2cjosuhh6snihbce9j3e8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdgm9o70cjh2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6462md9dp69d4mf9ak6e1o7hb4u6sevkotvgscg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdgm9o70cjh2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdq76fib1c578tb5kki06li6o82msb0ucsr5tuhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cdgm9o70cjh2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.

| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---

It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---

---|---

clean_body: We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo The Food Crisis of 2023 We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food is designed to last for 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food." And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest! And that's not all, because... FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... FREE Bonus #2: You'll get a Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: You'll also get an Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... ---
At this moment in American history, when half of our people are living paycheck to paycheck, when tens of millions cannot afford housing or health care, and we face the existential threat of climate change, it has never been more important to support progressive candidates who will fight for working people.
The truth is that if progressives are going to fight corporate greed and create a government that works for all of us, we must bring people together in a multi-generational, multi-racial political movement which is prepared to take on the big-money interests that have so much economic and political power in our country.
Greg not only shares our vision for a future to help working people — Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, labor and union protections, and more — but as an organizer and former city councilmember, he's proven he's got what it takes to act as a progressive leader in Congress.
Even after his election, Greg's campaign has continued to support on-the-ground organizing to inspire less-likely voters to get involved and stay engaged. It's that kind of grassroots, people-powered action that is the foundation of our progressive movement, and it's those efforts that will help us continue our fight for justice in Texas and all across the country.
But it takes a tremendous amount of resources to get the word out, especially when competing against the billionaire class and large corporations — and their unlimited sums of money. **That's why people like Greg depend on grassroots supporters like you.**
**[Can you please make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with Congressman Greg Casar today? Your support today will make a big difference for his campaign, and for our nationwide progressive movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57302569/387482504/-1305541238?refcode=em-20230113&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDAyMGJhNi05NTkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fY4EFMu2JDyzMAcyUTXfJnhD9MNF68L1V4rEUrH3ZLk=)**
Thank you in advance for contributing, and for everything that you do.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f87f4412c73442e49f3ec5751f4ceec8&_e=oeGzVgxYJrNRWW8YPH7_gu71LDEIWIZz2CwaTcD5qBkgToijH-o3Jnnsmi-Y7iVxa9ys2QyhzPgswfmRWp6UwmqBVycqsK2ihCcYGxL8fm4ZdljyTwWMUmVRrcokqQnHuSatWxX-QzpJZ1s62LRm1gV38I0c5zwf4WSrAQKrQwkIYwrXxBebUBlQVw_cljjQoQjq8lTzJTElNaj3_Za9RenzEoBx9jUXUauZIe-B6W2R2t5OY4wndUxRC0agt4UuRisKjU_HYVxA3UnbZdTGDMQDkGMoChWiVKspOxRrwXJXfdsBuhsq_VWmcThf3wOR37V7LBUeQC6tdLac-YSgRYRs9Q8kqk8kYek-KxakuAS2YuGdkZIQ9FvCmP_lOe-nLiLWme5J3t5FIH6TMN7fRw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f87f4412c73442e49f3ec5751f4ceec8&_e=oeGzVgxYJrNRWW8YPH7_gu71LDEIWIZz2CwaTcD5qBkgToijH-o3Jnnsmi-Y7iVxa9ys2QyhzPgswfmRWp6UwmqBVycqsK2ihCcYGxL8fm4ZdljyTwWMUmVRrcokqQnHuSatWxX-QzpJZ1s62LRm1gV38I0c5zwf4WSrAQKrQwkIYwrXxBebUBlQVw_cljjQoQjq8lTzJTElNaj3_Za9RenzEoBx9jUXUauZIe-B6W2R2t5OY4wndUxRC0agt4Uuut7_fRQkgxjYiCXWq_zLnf5KjJ12M-XrVt9pOZU_fw6rwIcZfcpywUaJTTZjj68jqaTpdjc1BSBG5IrL3kc7eLaveeicbchYNe3StyPjnLBMJYwzoor5dCrDJP4i-1XeVhCsn1yq251DDXMQIk7eJg%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World Wars " on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Hey Peter, are you ready for accountability in Washington? After two years of one-party rule by Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi, conservatives finally have the power to perform real government oversight and perform substantial investigations:
We’ve put together [**this list**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c70358d532464f0794552897fef12894&_e=S8Fv8JSoLeqITgU-_CrGjongFPaQWG0ePhgWgsrhCyDe0FbToFciSP_4GMGJeDrEv4w0fBDVzX6V1OlAymDhYkjyzPcx4e5OcB5uI5QqIhLsfM6LpSLvvrg49TW1sKeAVqLVR6zRIeR2vmaVFNUHnN1zUt0Q2KE-c3JRSIEq6JLQ9iITqIPmNLmhEmBz2Rstp75hnS-DeSPXRojfKYSjHKdE0ZpFNEhLZkh9f2L8SKoHQYAhJ5yY5CxPsl2AgKYxIEZM6M200amsNAWaXCqI8t0lx4-IuSBVuhXinXEXz4xRzy1g-Ov_eko9gK2O6jh5ut4HmOuno5hQbznjtgy5kLDjTkhivjJe-tjMTnmm2P_5qYkWtWG5XdhhFT75YgyOo0SvY1G2yUjwMk9Zj1DlML1hawxrG5W_P1J7PH8-aS0hDoedOGuhxKdR_jbTf1EG) of investigations Heritage Action and our conservative supporters would like to see the Republican-controlled House take on.

| | The American Greatness movement is laser-focused on restoring American Sovereignty and Constitutional Government. Our mission is to secure our borders, create safer communities, and overall put America first. To achieve this mission, we must address the border crisis. Biden made his first-ever border visit as president after systematically dismantling every major border security measure. Biden’s actions have resulted in record-breaking numbers of illegal crossings, enrichment of drug cartels, and devasting humanitarian crisis. It’s time we hold the Biden administration accountable and offer solutions that restores American Greatness.

body:
It’s time to lay the groundwork for 2024.
#
Peter,
We can’t thank you enough for being a part of this team. We won our race in Washington state and then took it even further — we expanded the majority in what turned out to be a stronger than expected cycle for Senate Democrats. Now, we’re ready to keep that momentum going.
That’s why we’re thrilled that, after leading Democrats to a historic victory in 2022, Senator Gary Peters is officially returning to his role as chair of the Democratic Senate Campaign Committee.
**[There is a lot of work to do between now and the next election — but the time to lay the groundwork starts now. clean_body: COVID cover-up continues | | | | | Friend – House Republicans China admitted to knowing the COVID genetic sequence to develop a vaccine in early January 2020. Our tax dollars funded a Chinese Military Research Institute, where a coronavirus scientist developed a COVID vaccine in February 2020 , well before COVID became a pandemic. U.S. intelligence agencies refuse to name the “scientific experts” used to oversee China’s gain-of-function research. One of the “scientific experts” taking part in these gain-of-function experiments brought NIH funding directly to the Wuhan Institute of Virology, where the COVID lab leak took place. Friend, the intelligence community can try to cover up what REALLY took place throughout the COVID pandemic, but we’re not letting this go. We’re going to uncover the truth because the millions of Americans who died during the pandemic deserve better. In liberty, Rand Paul | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | |

body:
| | | **Democrats need YOU to defend our razor-thin Senate majority** \-- _all gifts will be TRIPLED ahead of our mid-month deadline!_

---
**3X-IMPACT MATCH OFFER: ACTIVE**
**SUGGESTED DONATION: $5 ($15 IMPACT!)**

**[Will you help us answer the call by chipping in $5 (becomes $15) to defend the Senate? Your donation will be TRIPLED to help Democrats gain an early advantage >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11624?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230113-UrgentRequest-FirstGoal2023-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230113-UrgentRequest-FirstGoal2023-Pros-sl1&akid=9472%2E9716520%2E-eYTX9)**

Team -- In the last election, THOUSANDS of Democrats donated to _**EXPAND**_ our Senate majority after President Obama _personally_ reached out and asked for help.

But now, we’re just days away from our first major deadline of the year -- and we’re falling dangerously short of our must-hit $250,000 goal! Our fundraising filings are public records, so a missed goal would send a _horrible signal_ that Democrats aren’t up to the task in 2024.

To catch up, we’ve activated a **special Triple-Impact Match** and made it available to an _**exclusive**_ number of top Democrats. **So please, before midnight Sunday:** **

**[Will you chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ or even more so Democrats can hit Sunday’s CRUCIAL mid-month fundraising goal to defend our Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/11624?amount=5&t=7&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230113-UrgentRequest-FirstGoal2023-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230113-UrgentRequest-FirstGoal2023-Pros-sl1&akid=9472%2E9716520%2E-eYTX9)**

| | Friend - House Republicans _[**recently discovered** ...](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=07addeb5f21b460eaf246822eb8193a5&_e=23PECnhC9NGJIJL1PWYIiimUb_8WP-KRwbZiO3nXqwne5VaQRhcsTI4Pm8vC29tiozL5jAo8kI5nrGKdgRuIUp8dJMm6GvJE-Atm6TBEacGqTARYK89xyzBca4B-O2eSck54vUFfxHa772FEA851uGh_p6mNMvwblL1Evad16MUonatzfUmYR-LHwtd-gF_CY3LpN83RZJEstpz9O8WxVuVVCo8WQRXKUifVJi5uZzD4zJ1k2pnUHger3c67iti0dWwI2C52LwWFOpTrZ9sr9XbLvqRMOCQ8GMXNlaggYEjK12kduQO0fr7l_WGb9JZq4VvDOpFpSXpMewaXP3lwoc29mkPKrGvDoo3U8ctY1JSYCWkV30M9zlM1BXRX7QomroscSPqoqsTyVz2pjQdSBn3EdW1aK5Z-8nOXosfmI8M%3D)_

China admitted to knowing the COVID genetic sequence to develop a vaccine in __early January 2020._ __

_ Our tax dollars funded a Chinese Military Research Institute, where a coronavirus scientist **_developed a COVID vaccine_** _**_in February 2020_**_** _, well before COVID became a pandemic._****_

_**_[**> > HELP RAND UNCOVER THE TRUTH ABOUT COVID <<**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=07addeb5f21b460eaf246822eb8193a5&_e=23PECnhC9NGJIJL1PWYIiimUb_8WP-KRwbZiO3nXqwne5VaQRhcsTI4Pm8vC29tiozL5jAo8kI5nrGKdgRuIUp8dJMm6GvJE-Atm6TBEacGqTARYK89xyzBca4B-O2eSck54vUFfxHa772FEA851uGh_p6mNMvwblL1Evad16MUonatzfUmYR-LHwtd-gF_CY3LpN83RZJEstpz9O8WxVuVVCo8WQRXKUifVJi5uZzD4zJ1k2pnUHger3c67iti0dWwI2C52LwWFOpTrZ9sr9UO0-fSCM85GSc0s92w-MyGkwr6yjC-ZSBCSjqp358l37JgGd6pALDT-CUUudWpxMsEg0VDhmJuUT7ZQUyKxbtJ7Axn-VXOr6mtVGKR_eQhAqR3xOm2y0q-lbAlKuQ1dFul8POFAzrB5T7GnfOVqj44%3D)_**
** U.S. intelligence agencies refuse to name the "scientific experts" used to oversee China's gain-of-function research.

One of the "scientific experts" taking part in these gain-of-function experiments brought NIH funding directly to the Wuhan Institute of Virology, where the COVID lab leak took place. **Friend, the intelligence community can try to cover up what REALLY took place throughout the COVID pandemic, but we 're not letting this go. ** **_We 're going to uncover the truth because the _****_millions_**** _of Americans who died during the pandemic deserve better._****__**_[**I AGREE >>**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=07addeb5f21b460eaf246822eb8193a5&_e=23PECnhC9NGJIJL1PWYIiimUb_8WP-KRwbZiO3nXqwne5VaQRhcsTI4Pm8vC29tiozL5jAo8kI5nrGKdgRuIUp8dJMm6GvJE-Atm6TBEacGqTARYK89xyzBca4B-O2eSck54vUFfxHa772FEA851uGh_p6mNMvwblL1Evad16MUonatzfUmYR-LHwtd-gF_CY3LpN83RZJEstpz9O8WxVuVVCo8WQRXKUifVJi5uZzD4zJ1k2pnUHger3c67iti0dWwI2C52LwWFOpTrZ9sr9XmU32VSUPqrDCjc6fahqBLJPjq9l2O-HmNaWeeHK9o1g8i3gyDMpwuGWiZncIcpSmjsbEajTfrvFpSvxwyUhHySbaDBWf1duASFmOd-NgWyZ3wFIn5GJc1jP9xFOYa7BFxauY343-Umexvv3rojB-s%3D)_ _[**Stand with Rand: Chip in to pull funding from the intel community for their COVID cover-up. >>**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=07addeb5f21b460eaf246822eb8193a5&_e=23PECnhC9NGJIJL1PWYIiimUb_8WP-KRwbZiO3nXqwne5VaQRhcsTI4Pm8vC29tiozL5jAo8kI5nrGKdgRuIUp8dJMm6GvJE-Atm6TBEacGqTARYK89xyzBca4B-O2eSck54vUFfxHa772FEA851uGh_p6mNMvwblL1Evad16MUonatzfUmYR-LHwtd-gF_CY3LpN83RZJEstpz9O8WxVuVVCo8WQRXKUifVJi5uZzD4zJ1k2pnUHger3c67iti0dWwI2C52LwWFOpTrZ9sr9WWneUvKGalyQ5xLOOaYJI7bj_0qUl4l7Tlhqese5I_W0TyK_HI4opPngH8js3l4kr7eM3bzxUVH7GtxVVawBY4qIII8iuPsThdPzidkt2iiTZa7DFdMFAFbzZsGtOa2BWOQJd2wGT4FCzGgmzLhwV0%3D)_

name: Adam Schiff
subject: We make our own news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Republicans were only able to elect a Speaker by relying on the likes of Matt Gaetz, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert, and George Santos. Yeah, those people.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1581%2E5257348%2EhIs4G9)
Derek,
It’s Friday the 13th, and in the House of Representatives, a nightmare is playing out for our democracy.
Republicans were only able to elect a Speaker by relying on the likes of Matt Gaetz, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert, and George Santos. Yeah, those people.
Now, McCarthy is asking right-wing donors if he should remove me from the Intelligence Committee for my role in impeaching Donald Trump.
It would be easy to attribute Kevin McCarthy’s repeated failures to be elected House Speaker to Trump’s waning influence in the party.
But that would be a grave mistake.
**McCarthy is more dependent on Trump than ever, for corralling the deciding votes that got McCarthy the prize he always wanted — a hollowed-out version of the Speaker’s office. Without Trump, he would not have become Speaker. Without Trump, he will not remain Speaker.**
We need to put an end to this mess in 2024 and start preparing — right now.
**[Can you chip in now to help us build the resources to take the fight to the Republican Party in 2024? As the GOP devolves into competing MAGA factions, we cannot allow them to outraise us. Not now. Not at this critical juncture.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Bvk6kQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1581%2E5257348%2EhIs4G9)**

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. Peter,

Because of grassroots supporters like you, Peter, in 2022 we were able to elect Black leaders to every level of government and build Black political power across the country.

Now, our team is starting to lay our groundwork for the next two years. While we lay the foundation, we want to hear from **_YOU_** , one of our top supporters.

[Please take our survey to let us know where we should focus our efforts in 2023 and beyond. It won’t take more than 2 minutes!!](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkc_LuhNMcusU0-Z0R0kweV9Yhh7rTDkHGbbE8EpRzcxFQ5ASPIwzDhQJzSwk5jYg946F8gosGpBqjgaye5e56b206xqRmvlOnDxbjHfq7v6eBKo5nDPMF2MSGReS3dbCzBGLgfHNVIuQXiOirJPeE-G84_4oqg9J-VwGJGpqatI9q8wirGcuoVGfCpei2e2aii1GSQxWD0xzEuHB5pePDaCfFgVKfYVDlQFEwAEsE6TWRz1HUy7tgMKxR0nwNJlg-ocEk2lQqLYrXTmI7HHnsYYs1lBk7_XcdG-TIfw9y2Iw/3st/60_YIOckTNyB7aMCwcHRRg/h3/w5wOcXg_nHHvXiUsAoCOmb_QIpKXHewqUY4gOSHLSIs)

Thank you again for being a valued member of The Collective PAC team. Supporters like you are critical to achieving our mission, and we can’t wait to see what we continue to accomplish with you on our team.

— The Collective PAC

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iQevwRMX83U0D_H1tdhXt-7rHD7T0IpgCu2Btfqivni2Wo5bHY4uIPxP0leK6a_INblbmvyArcWiDH_27ye-XZFrYicHk0AK4ugLdWrhqzX41oBbNXq7Do8WrnOF5Ok9oP7SeASA7vDI0Kfuxv6xRnBdCpXYg1487ZnWwTjBohWsmmfuolwBulAPvn29lfKkhGn6bF_ddoUTTlF5fvzp1AfuEjDcKW8vt0djUTmT_jxCrVnihoP1hRrtpQS8P07nRXrZhUdfM3MZA817NuYEq9gXlBudRjMknQVP4DRGPjsX/3st/60_YIOckTNyB7aMCwcHRRg/h5/uP3tF6SZOa-1TWm8LYCw35M4AfnF6GjlQpqerPD_oIk) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lauren=20Boebert?=
subject: What a productive week in Congress
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=934f90741c&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter**WOW, what a productive week in Congress.**

We’re **changing the way business is done** in Washington because we stood our ground.

Congress is broken and our stand will help dramatically fix it! Now, **Republicans are united** following the important debate on the Speaker and rules.

We officially approved many new structural changes that will be a MAJOR step toward governing in a CONSERVATIVE way for the American people.

[**Please help us keep the momentum going and take on the Swamp!**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4afc49aa0f&e=fdefed58de)
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0923cd0960&e=fdefed58de)
Our success this past week is a win for everyone who believes in representative government! And you know what -- we're not wasting any time, already voting to DEFUND Biden's new 87,000 IRS agents that were intended to target middle-class Americans.

We’ll be **stronger, more united** and **more effective** than ever.

These new rules empower every individual member of Congress!

I'm so proud that we took a few extra days to make sure that we get this right.

So now we have to take this momentum and put it to work -- [**pitch in today so we can hold Washington accountable for the American people!**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3e7543750e&e=fdefed58de) I promise to never stop fighting for you.

For Freedom,
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5e83d6dd8a&e=fdefed58de)

body:
Here’s the critical changes we secured.
Here's the critical changes we secured.
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6f091ec0cc24952919cf1cc6c902954&_e=NShLIVGF9sAlbN75BUG65wg4htKEfQn0xUpqbOd5of7X5jRA-nDBVb1hFPEbyx9aCnYiXcHqu1YvqxBMjfuLcGdEJjGnGi3wGzfVt4GedIbPb_qEpkWJtAUuutS2sr01h9Whj70ip2S97e2r6WIMHnUqMjc6vGU_3SQW3CyyIiQSLkNSV60v_NOzT00WLCrAyMkTp8bGVmvWWIAKXGQ4IpAhrOO_x2DgVsEn12rvQtypn90WRwUqXvfVSEEjdlXT6esS0kJRjyGZBUSUZXjSrQVBm0PrCUzxcIwfZDD-LRkX_MxC9kTpoQhXbkLO88_6ztn6xzPc-w3Bq-2_2fsFENNlFrx4OnlMfFhgmu27KY8%3D)
---
Friend,
---
The institution in Washington is broken. Congress doesn't work for the American people, and to be honest, it hasn't in a long time.
---
**Corrupt establishment swamp politicians have repeatedly sold-out hard-working Americans while doling out favors to lobbyists and special interest groups.**
---
In order to effectively fight for YOU over the next two years, we needed to make fundamental, institutional changes to the way that Congress functions.
---
_That 's why I joined 19 of my colleagues to hold the line in the people's House until we secured a deal that accomplished the following: _
---
* Reverses Nancy Pelosi's rule change and returns the House to the 100+ year precedent of allowing a single member to bring up a motion to remove a speaker if they break their promises or betray the American people.

* Promises a vote on term limits and a Texas border security plan.

* Requires single subject bills instead of several thousand-page monstrosities that are full of unrelated provisions and irrelevant nonsense.

* Requires a minimum of 72 hours to read and review the contents of a bill.

* Establishes an investigation into the weaponization of the FBI, DOJ, and other government agencies.

* Holds Biden and Senate Democrats in check by ensuring that debt ceiling increases will be accompanied by reductions in spending.

---
Now, conservatives will be able to truly fight for WE THE PEOPLE with our new House majority.
---

Some of the institutional changes we secured may seem small, but they are things that are critical for the House moving forward.
---
After the FBI's illegal and partisan raid on President Trump's home last summer, we've got to pursue investigations to explore possible abuses of power.
---
The motion to vacate rule for the speaker was in place in the House for over a hundred years until Nancy Pelosi changed it, and reinstating it is a huge step towards restoring accountability in Washington.
---
_In the real world, if you lead a company, it only takes one member of the board of directors to hold a vote against the chairman of the board or the CEO._
---
It shouldn't be any different in Congress. Restoring the single-member threshold ensures that any future speaker is fully accountable to the members.
---
_If you want the job of leading the House, then you shouldn 't be afraid of that. _
---
**Requiring single subject bills and a minimum of 72 hours to read and review them are major steps towards transparency and reducing wasteful spending.**
---
Far too often in Washington, various laws, provisions, and funding for dozens of separate, unrelated issues are cobbled together into massive Frankenstein bills.
---
Then, members are only given a few short hours to read them before they're forced to vote yes or no on the entire thing.
---
The recent 4,000+ page omnibus that authorized $1.7 TRILLION in reckless spending is a perfect example of why these rules are desperately needed.
---
These rules changes matter immensely, Friend.
---
_They ultimately dictate how the House functions, and that goes directly to the ability of us accomplishing the solutions that we promised the American people._
---
Things like securing the border, budgetary restraint, and holding the Biden Administration accountable will be much easier to accomplish because of these changes.
---
When I came to Washington, I vowed to stop the destruction being caused by radical far-Left progressives and advance an America First agenda.
---
Last Friday was a massive step towards delivering on that promise.
---
But this was only the beginning. We still have a lot of work to do.
---
To keep up the fight, we're depending on support from grassroots, America First patriots like YOU.
---

---
Thank you,
---

body:
| | |
---
**Peter, my first public fundraising report of 2023 will be locked in at 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT – and we’re STILL $3,193 short of our $10,000 goal.**

The moment my fundraising numbers go public, the most powerful and wealthy forces in the country will be poring over them to see if we’ve finally lost momentum. And if we give them any indication that we have, they will spend the rest of 2023 attempting to _bury_ our work.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Michigan’s new majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230113 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230113]
Team,
If there’s one thing we’ve seen over the past year, it’s that majorities matter.
The first day of the new Michigan legislature was earlier this week. It was the first time we’ve seen a Democratic majority in both the Michigan House AND Senate in over 40 years. As such, they didn’t waste time getting the ball rolling on legislation they’ve been trying to get across the line for decades.
They’ve already announced legislation aimed at restoring the rights of workers, expanding the earned income tax credit, protecting LGBTQ Michiganders, and repealing the retirement tax that impacts many of Michigan’s seniors. I’m also hearing there will be a renewed push for the gun storage bill Senator Rosemary Bayer introduced last term. That bill is the state companion to my Safe Guns Safe Kids bill, which we introduced following the shooting at Oxford High School in 2021.
Also notable is that, after the success of our pro-choice ballot initiative in November, the legislature is moving on formal legislation to repeal the 1931 law still on Michigan’s books that criminalizes abortion in almost all circumstances.
It’s a stark contrast to the agenda of the new Republican majority in the U.S. House of Representatives, where earlier this week, we voted on anti-choice legislation. Because of the Republicans’ new majority, it passed by a small number of votes. But thankfully, Democrats still hold the majority in the Senate – and this type of extreme legislation will not become law.
Bottom line: majorities matter. It’s why holding on to competitive seats is so important. I’m thrilled that Michigan has a real chance to make meaningful change at the state level, and I’ll be doing all I can to try to get things done in the House.
If you’d like to help me continue to push for legislation that matters, chip in below. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230113]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230113]
Elissa

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: My pre-existing condition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57304247/387493393/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDg0MTMyZi1hMDkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=INr9ZTdrSmpGFtaK3miN4OsnBHt6D43xCpwSBUvqQN8=&emci=af03e843-8c93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=c084132f-a093-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=252045)
---
Hi there — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! If you have a minute or two today, I wanted to take a moment to tell you a little more about myself, why I ran for U.S. Senate, and why our campaign in Wisconsin is so important. When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents who raised me began to look for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. However, because of my previous illness, they couldn’t find such a policy. Not from any insurer. Not at _any_ price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child who had been labeled with those words: **“pre-existing condition.”** I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that. **Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the Affordable Care Act was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.** Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed that reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plans up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans launch a new attack on our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. They’ve spent years playing politics with people’s lives. **And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules.** I’ll never back down, folks, but we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us to protect this seat, so I’ll need your support every step of the way. **Will you split a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and Martin Heinrich’s in New Mexico? I’ll never stop fighting to ensure every American has access to quality, affordable health care — regardless of whether or not they have a pre-existing condition — and it’d mean a lot to me to have your support in that fight.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Tammy Baldwin and Martin Heinrich:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57304248/387493394/-1694976873?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDg0MTMyZi1hMDkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=INr9ZTdrSmpGFtaK3miN4OsnBHt6D43xCpwSBUvqQN8=)

I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My own personal experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage, and stand up against those who want to take it away.
Thank you for reading, and thanks for your support today.
— Tammy

Hello - The White House just admitted a SECOND batch of classified documents were uncovered... _NOT in a secure SCIF ... NOT in a locked safe... But in Joe Biden's garage!_

Remember when Mar-a-Lago was RAIDED by armed federal agents? The Liberal Media was in a frenzy demanding investigations and immediate action. And now? _Nothing._

The Left wants to sweep this story under the rug. Don't let them! We're rallying every Conservative in America to stand up and hold these hypocrites accountable.
