name: Travis Bull Johnson for Congress
subject: My final address as a candidate 🎙
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Travis "Bull" Johnson for Congress Committee_
body:
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | |
---
**Hello all,** This will be **my last email to you as a Congressional Candidate/former congressional candidate**. A lot has happened since the election, but before I go into that I want to thank all of you for your support in my run for Congress. We ran, what appears to be, the **second most successful 3 rd party candidate race for a major office in the country** (with a Democrat and GOP involved). For a “Pot” candidate in a very conservative district that is quite the accomplishment and I could not have done it without you. I have decided at this point that **I will not be running for Congress in 2024**. Many of you have expressed that I should remain in the picture and push for the change we need. Instead, I’ve decided to do it in a different way, in the form of – the Constitutional Republic Party (CRP).

---
| |
---
| Constitutional Republic Party
---
---
| | | |
---
The CRP launched about a month ago and I have been busy putting the pieces together since then. It simply wouldn’t be possible to run a congressional campaign and grow the party at the same time. We are, however, considering a run at the state level under the CRP. The focus of the CRP, along with the guiding principles aren’t that different from my campaign – **small, limited government (as envisioned by the original reading of the constitution) and the protection of our freedoms and liberties**. As we move forward, the CRP will strive to keep the platform small, and limited to those principles. This will give CRP candidates the maximum freedom to develop their own platforms as long as they stick to those two overarching principles. My complaint with the BIG parties remains – they expect loyalty to the party first and foremost, they expect the candidate or the representative to be a vassal to the party. The CRP is not looking for vassals but partners, those that will work together towards a common cause. **In 2024, the primary focus of the party will be to recruit and support a candidate for US Senate, with the goal of reaching 5% in that race.** That 5% would give us major party status in MN and grant us ballot access for all races. This is within reach! We do not expect a major push from the GOP against Amy Klobachar, and it was clear in 2022 how ineffective the GOP was in state races. Once again, I thank all of you for your support. I will be rolling this email list into the list for the new party next week. If you want to be excluded from that list please feel free to unsubscribe, however I do hope you’ll stick around. I will maintain my campaign website until we formally decide whether or not we will run for state office, at which time we will adjust the domain and content.
---
| |
---
| Campaign Merchandise
---
---
| |
---
| We have some campaign merchandise still available! Our webpage store has closed, however I’ll post a list of available items on the Facebook page: [https://www.facebook.com/BullJohnsonforCongress](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMTI3MDUyNzk3OTk1MTI5NjI3JmM9bTN0NCZlPTAmYj0xMDY0MjA4NzA0JmQ9ejB6NWgycA==.QI0HXwNFn3f_GJDcdGe9UTMFJBeAv-zMINAmYb3I-C0). If you see anything you’d like, just send me a message. Payment may be made here, through the donation page: [https://bulljohnsonforcongress.us/](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMTI3MDUyNzk3OTk1MTI5NjI3JmM9bTN0NCZlPTAmYj0xMDY0MjA4NzA2JmQ9dzhhOXU1Yg==.e6sQFUsjoIB2-oKQuGRBfFREamunFcHPQjEYzOz6Bgg)
---
---
| |
---
| Join The CRP
---
---
| |
---
| Finally, I ask that you consider joining the new party! **CRP Membership:**
* ****$50 a year for a regular membership
* $100 for a plank membership (limited to the first 100)

Plank members will serve as the guardians of the party principles. They have the ability to veto any change to the principles of the party and will be our bulwark against a hostile takeover or abuse from other parties. We’ve seen it happen to third parties before and we won’t let it happen to the CRP. Check out the new party.
[https://www.constitutionalrepublicparty.us/](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMTI3MDUyNzk3OTk1MTI5NjI3JmM9bTN0NCZlPTAmYj0xMDY0MjA4NzA4JmQ9ZDNsOGMwbg==.TAHPooOmJFsR_UBJPM49VC62sfw-o6QKdF4aU20P2X4) Find us on Facebook
[https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100087973966429](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMTI3MDUyNzk3OTk1MTI5NjI3JmM9bTN0NCZlPTAmYj0xMDY0MjA4NzEwJmQ9eTFsMnU3dA==.Bd2hKE9Kvw4elBCPKv_fdOyMfaIrSrKg9kBRH5IzpX0) Follow us on Twitter
[https://twitter.com/ConsRepUS](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMTI3MDUyNzk3OTk1MTI5NjI3JmM9bTN0NCZlPTAmYj0xMDY0MjA4NzEyJmQ9YTJtNGo4dg==.uSZOr4tosutFQ21oxTOwLgOFgird1x9eOnibnV0o2d8)

---
---
| |
---
| | [Join Today!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMTI3MDUyNzk3OTk1MTI5NjI3JmM9bTN0NCZlPTAmYj0xMDY0MjA4NzE2JmQ9ZTV1N20wbA==.PPhBZ91sIxMP3A2okfMcvYqbcKWhKOW77NKngCFnUdo)
---

---

---|---|---
---
| |
---
| Thank you for your support!
---
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Yours in liberty,
---
| Bull Johnson
---
---
Chair, Constitutional Republic Party

name: Team Joe
subject: [1/13/23] Your Team Joe Newsletter 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Here’s your weekly newsletter highlighting all of our party’s work. Read on for a look at what President Biden and Democrats have been up to this week → | |
---
Derek -- We’re almost halfway through January, and Democrats are off to a great start to the year. The support from this grassroots team makes our progress possible -- and for that, we want to say _thank you!_ **Read on for a look at what President Biden and Democrats have been up to this week →**

* * *
**Presidential Citizens Medals** For the first time in President Biden’s presidency, he bestowed the Presidential Citizens Medal, one of our nation’s highest civilian honors. It recognizes Americans who have performed exemplary deeds of service for their country or their fellow citizens. The honorees included some of those who defended our democracy with courage and bravery during the violent insurrection on January 6, 2021. We owe an immense amount of gratitude to these heroes, and we’re proud to see them bestowed with such honors.
[**WATCH HERE**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8HRkH7ccO-WcY9DGOEp0REBO142lxgKhBrjKOCyOT0oLoz86mWal37GPGevWLJcDSjPTRadJgujGe59Wh5ldTx_6-JmaYrj1nzDWHXEoF-_HP26JIBDPeMat7zngWOS__CwGZ7an5ZHwO8vAeogDOUITIu4i3duDCVw1DYGcEd8RDwQHwmTR-a1iB6p3o6sSStO4esc5y8Q6PqDe_rUmbowMksLuhDQZj2tJW1enL4ZrSoRwXOB8eUFKqZEYQuqFSqGotWJb87Claak8vn18IkxtWOeXS17zOokBL3Zan2d_JYVNzZ_DZYDBRRu3QgwbofkVLOCPtCYKWcJvSkhlTVbTTJI6bXCsgKIieu3KYccbdxaWZdn9cvfcIhqEIynDrU/3st/tkR5gSX7RjCZtGpUyjaF3A/h0/AUIKKZ7wUKnSQdKQKDSst6AomTjpUJ62tViwABwbcHs)

* * *
**A Historic Economic Recovery** Under President Biden’s leadership, we currently have one of the lowest unemployment rates in 50 years. With over 11 million jobs created, more Americans are working than ever before. That’s no accident -- it's the result of the Biden-Harris agenda in action.
[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhr_xp3_qH--u-pRIadJ8z5QF1xn74oJE0ylNu2A53rB7clHgYFNTb32blhcbB_g9QqgbeVOHcTc-9aBXje9muTEjazH0cPteVyp3m6sI8a1foz35iJ90A-w9PXXdPuG7jyLQxAvyyactQHzRCaKpF_QmVdD810X0uVuOZ_A7QKxwGVnVwQw931hNA0Z-I6NNxwmUKrDwvHPFOY9d1WswFZPcaYoN4pmgdM5XHNto--tm8FdzjfQiaHpd3ehY6n7TrYDy0YSU9YGcjyTEZbhng6dMVbjksKdpIdBwU1GE21HU-_3jpe5lo8pOSOC4En9tm9KNCVtInkAHYsrUbOFKHXWaDhoT2rSTdGmctfIKkWgtiKa5xGtHfgm-C_n0WAkOz_hvH4URfKr8CFPzuHg8D37rnusPTaxuZVKPliZW20sR/3st/tkR5gSX7RjCZtGpUyjaF3A/h1/lzlOWG7AVGZNtZgtzV0nBjyqyAo5YWzWC1mJICQB4yc)
[**WATCH HERE**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhr_xp3_qH--u-pRIadJ8z5QF1xn74oJE0ylNu2A53rB7clHgYFNTb32blhcbB_g9QmWmgmGlUILSEKnxROreh4kt03Aj5g3fGJQcb3921m0N3KC9_9wlrXNHU9yuOQzVTOOkA0IZQAKz_JWbO2UueSiM_CrmyZOn5qP1ngBwSYIsu8SXMagCy4Ig3BEF8Hm4_UPFIx_Gox27tjR7fBosJf0zTeRtVqwR6ZOh1IgRW2OVcxP2WhBEe2cWKfen3_YWr_CLBTtvNfh5HrcvFkMiHQvpiG9vag8SWVNprm8CWS6vEbBiL4tO6t5cxm1_H2DW6soENDXtspF05lxpJ12zlQjLFsD-Q0NT0YTzRA154MGsiGU7MI9CCrSlbSzTz3As50Kdg4GSFiOA4DoYu-NV0Mw6t4NSf6FgzCzOWUl0a4Q-/3st/tkR5gSX7RjCZtGpUyjaF3A/h2/WbNcURojKuz-M7lx57tx6l56KX1QLdwQ4ZDIMJ4TWGo)

* * *
**The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law in Action** Thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, more than 7,000 infrastructure projects started last year. **On top of that, this year, more than 20,000 projects will be underway.** _Twenty thousand, Derek!_ These projects include upgrading and building new bridges, installing clean lead pipes, getting more people access to high-speed internet, creating good-paying construction and manufacturing jobs, and so much more. All of these will bring critical infrastructure to working families and Americans across the nation -- and it’s proof that when Democrats are in charge, we deliver.

clean_body: Here’s your weekly newsletter highlighting all of our party’s work. Read on for a look at what President Biden and Democrats have been up to this week → | | Derek -- We’re almost halfway through January, and Democrats are off to a great start to the year. The support from this grassroots team makes our progress possible -- and for that, we want to say thank you! Read on for a look at what President Biden and Democrats have been up to this week → Presidential Citizens Medals For the first time in President Biden’s presidency, he bestowed the Presidential Citizens Medal, one of our nation’s highest civilian honors. It recognizes Americans who have performed exemplary deeds of service for their country or their fellow citizens. The honorees included some of those who defended our democracy with courage and bravery during the violent insurrection on January 6, 2021. We owe an immense amount of gratitude to these heroes, and we’re proud to see them bestowed with such honors. A Historic Economic Recovery Under President Biden’s leadership, we currently have one of the lowest unemployment rates in 50 years. With over 11 million jobs created, more Americans are working than ever before. That’s no accident -- it's the result of the Biden-Harris agenda in action. The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law in Action Thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, more than 7,000 infrastructure projects started last year. On top of that, this year, more than 20,000 projects will be underway. Twenty thousand, Derek! These projects include upgrading and building new bridges, installing clean lead pipes, getting more people access to high-speed internet, creating good-paying construction and manufacturing jobs, and so much more. All of these will bring critical infrastructure to working families and Americans across the nation -- and it’s proof that when Democrats are in charge, we deliver. Get Your “Truth Over Flies” Fly Swatters As a member of this grassroots team, we wanted you to make sure you had a chance to get our “Truth Over Flies” fly swatter. These were a fan favorite in 2020, and they’re selling fast again! Starting 2023 Off Strong The Democratic National Committee is the only party organization that elects Democrats from the school board to the Senate. It’s crucial to keep building on our progress and infrastructure for future success, especially right now with elections in 2023 and 2024 and a Republican majority in the House. body:
Democrats are working to destroy public safety and your right to bear arms

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

_**Transcript** _
PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP: The now-famous “Twitter Files” have proven beyond all doubt that the corrupt officials at the FBI have been coordinating a massive censorship, surveillance, and propaganda campaign against the American People, and frankly against me.
In the most recent and notorious example, the FBI worked to stop the truth from being told about the Biden Family’s criminality —they worked so hard to stop it from coming out — and the corruption prior to the 2020 election. They didn’t want any bad information to come out about the Biden family. The fix was in, the election was rigged.
But the censorship of the Laptop from Hell is only the beginning of the story about the weaponization of government against free speech. We must have free speech in our country. We must have a fair and free press. As recent reporting shows, the FBI and other rogue agencies have been systematically colluding with former national security officials placed in high positions at Twitter, and very likely other companies, to advance their censorship regime, which is really in this case to steal an election.
This anti-American effort, and a very illegal effort at that, has been working to silence dissenting opinions on COVID and crucial issues on public health and on the election, and elections in the future. They suppressed doctors and health experts who dared to question approved public health narratives. They censored voices who criticized school closures, lockdowns, and mandates. And they even banned people simply for stating proven scientific facts. And anything bad about China, they didn’t want out. But anything bad about Biden and the Biden Crime Family — and that’s what it was, just look at the Laptop from Hell — they didn’t want that coming out under any circumstances. What they wanted coming out was anything bad about your favorite president, me. Anything bad about Trump, put it out, even if it’s not true.
But this all had nothing to do with science. This had nothing to do with saving lives. It had everything to do with politics or a sick ideology. This was about government working with powerful corporations to seize power over YOU, the American People. And we can’t let that continue.
The “Twitter Files” prove that we urgently need my plan to dismantle the illegal censorship regime — a regime like nobody’s ever seen in the history of our country or most other countries for that matter. To prosecute the perpetrators for their crimes, and to restore free speech for all Americans — so important. We need a free press, we need free speech, we need fair elections, and we need borders.
The new Congress should immediately hold hearings to investigate the role of the FBI and other federal agencies in censoring lawful speech. Congressional leaders should promptly issue subpoenas in furtherance of this goal.
The revelations also highlight why my proposal to end the revolving door between the Deep State — and there is a Deep State indeed. I wasn’t a believer, but everybody’s a believer right now — and the tech tyrants is so important. There must be a 7-year cooling off period before any employee of these powerful agencies is allowed to take a job at a major platform.
When I am president, we will take back our freedoms. We will take back our country.

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump January 12th, 2023 ICYMI: Truths by Donald J. Trump | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 11th, 2023 Mar-a-Lago, FL \- In response to the stunning revelations from the "Twitter Files," President Donald J. Trump released a new video calling for an immediate investigation into the disturbing relationship between Big Tech platforms and government agencies, including the coordination of a massive censorship, surveillance, and propaganda campaign against the American people. . “The ‘Twitter Files’ prove that we urgently need my plan to dismantle the illegal censorship regime — a regime like nobody’s ever seen in the history of our country or most other countries for that matter,” President Trump said. Transcript PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP: The now-famous “Twitter Files” have proven beyond all doubt that the corrupt officials at the FBI have been coordinating a massive censorship, surveillance, and propaganda campaign against the American People, and frankly against me. In the most recent and notorious example, the FBI worked to stop the truth from being told about the Biden Family’s criminality —they worked so hard to stop it from coming out — and the corruption prior to the 2020 election. They didn’t want any bad information to come out about the Biden family. The fix was in, the election was rigged. But the censorship of the Laptop from Hell is only the beginning of the story about the weaponization of government against free speech. We must have free speech in our country. We must have a fair and free press. As recent reporting shows, the FBI and other rogue agencies have been systematically colluding with former national security officials placed in high positions at Twitter, and very likely other companies, to advance their censorship regime, which is really in this case to steal an election. This anti-American effort, and a very illegal effort at that, has been working to silence dissenting opinions on COVID and crucial issues on public health and on the election, and elections in the future. They suppressed doctors and health experts who dared to question approved public health narratives. They censored voices who criticized school closures, lockdowns, and mandates. And they even banned people simply for stating proven scientific facts. And anything bad about China, they didn’t want out. But anything bad about Biden and the Biden Crime Family — and that’s what it was, just look at the Laptop from Hell — they didn’t want that coming out under any circumstances. What they wanted coming out was anything bad about your favorite president, me. Anything bad about Trump, put it out, even if it’s not true. But this all had nothing to do with science. This had nothing to do with saving lives. It had everything to do with politics or a sick ideology. This was about government working with powerful corporations to seize power over YOU, the American People. And we can’t let that continue. The “Twitter Files” prove that we urgently need my plan to dismantle the illegal censorship regime — a regime like nobody’s ever seen in the history of our country or most other countries for that matter. To prosecute the perpetrators for their crimes, and to restore free speech for all Americans — so important. We need a free press, we need free speech, we need fair elections, and we need borders. The new Congress should immediately hold hearings to investigate the role of the FBI and other federal agencies in censoring lawful speech. Congressional leaders should promptly issue subpoenas in furtherance of this goal. The revelations also highlight why my proposal to end the revolving door between the Deep State — and there is a Deep State indeed. I wasn’t a believer, but everybody’s a believer right now — and the tech tyrants is so important. There must be a 7-year cooling off period before any employee of these powerful agencies is allowed to take a job at a major platform. When I am president, we will take back our freedoms. We will take back our country. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 11th, 2023 ICYMI: “Joe Biden Awards Infamous 2020 Election Workers With Presidential Citizens Medals” Ruby, her daughter, and the others who ran back into the counting room, grabbing the cases from under the “skirted” table, and then back to their counting machines where they came from prior to hearing “water main break” (which never happened) have got a lot of explaining to do. I predict that this medal, at a minimum, will someday be withdrawn. We need Honest Elections and Strong Borders for our Country to again be Great! subject: Hakeem Jeffries, our new House leader, is outstanding. Not just at legislating, but messaging what we're about in contrast to Republicans. After only three days of chaotic, corrupt, incompetent GOP rule, Jeffries said this to "leader-lite" McCarthy …
body:
When Democrats stand up, this happens
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa190ce1-d55d-4e9b-a9aa-3a226945116d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**_Will you join us today in giving Democratic Leader, Hakeem Jeffries, $5, $10, 25 or whatever you can, so he can continue fighting the know-nothing nihilism of the most extreme traitors in McCarthy's GOP caucus?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1c4e1cf-da62-4f92-9082-0c8933fde81d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Do you want the good news or the bad news first? Ok, we'll give you the good news. _ _**Hakeem Jeffries, our new House leader, is outstanding. Not just at legislating, but messaging what we're about in contrast to Republicans. **_After only three days of chaotic, corrupt, incompetent GOP rule, Jeffries said this to "leader-lite" McCarthy: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2705fb59-e763-47b7-935f-787e6042063f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

|

| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5085e5e8-83ac-4065-a195-cc45df0b2258/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _McCarthy gutted House ethics rules for his criminal caucus. He said he'd consider expunging House impeachment votes vs Trump. He's threatened to block raising the debt ceiling, to appease GOP Putinites while destroying our credit rating. _ [**_We must help incredible Democratic Leader, Hakeem Jeffries, stop him. So we ask you to join us today in giving Leader Jeffries $5, $10, 25 or whatever you can, so he can continue fighting the know-nothing nihilism of the most extreme traitors in McCarthy's caucus. The ones who pull his strings now._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4669e833-5939-43c3-a084-b8b5ded21688/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for protecting our country and our democracy.** Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce6018ab-e955-40ad-9fc6-932d42da612c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: What is the Transportation Secretary doing?
body:
TAKE ACTION NOW |

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/f0559a80cb46/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8113819?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/hold-buttigieg-accountable?recurring=true&amount=100&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230113_lori_hold-buttigieg-accountable

Peter,

It’s been a difficult few days for the FAA and those of us who rely on it.

We have seen delays and cancellations, and it’s all thanks to Pete Buttigieg’s mismanagement.

Buttigieg has failed to address the issues facing the FAA. As a result, we are now facing a HUGE aviation crisis, and it’s only getting worse.

We need to hold Sec. Buttigieg accountable – thankfully the new Republican majority plan to do just that. This isn’t the first crisis we have seen in air travel in 2023 and we plan to get to the bottom of this failure.

That's why I'm asking for your help. Together, we can ensure that the FAA is running smoothly, efficiently, and that our travel needs are being met. >>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/hold-buttigieg-accountable?recurring=true&amount=100&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230113_lori_hold-buttigieg-accountable)

Hello - The White House just admitted a SECOND batch of classified documents were uncovered... _NOT in a secure SCIF ... NOT in a locked safe... But in Joe Biden's garage!_

Remember when Mar-a-Lago was RAIDED by armed federal agents? The Liberal Media was in a frenzy demanding investigations and immediate action. And now? _Nothing._

The Left wants to sweep this story under the rug. Don't let them! We're rallying every Conservative in America to stand up and hold these hypocrites accountable.

body:
State auditor vows to exceed power by investigating schools | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
January 13, 2023
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **Contact Senator Roberts** 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329
Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov
---
| | | | | | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=4e20c35a68&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5394b373fa&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=137bec0143&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **State auditor vows to exceed power by investigating schools**
Shortly after being sworn in on Jan. 9, new State Auditor Scott Fitzpatrick pledged to exceed the constitutional authority of his office by investigating public school districts for allegedly teaching so-called “critical race theory.” Fitzpatrick, a Republican who had served as state treasurer since 2019, won election as auditor in November.

The Missouri Constitution restricts the state auditor to auditing the finances of state agencies and local governments, including school districts. It also bars the legislature from expanding the auditor’s role, saying: “No duty shall be imposed on him by law which is not related to the supervising and auditing of the receipt and expenditure of public funds.”

Critical race theory is an area of academic study taught in some law schools that examines the lingering impact of racism on institutions. It is not taught in K-12 schools in Missouri. However, conservative Republican politicians often use CRT as shorthand for any instruction or discussion of past or present racism in society. Fitzpatrick made investigating schools on the subject a central theme of his election campaign.

Fitzpatrick replaces Nicole Galloway, who did not seek election to a third term as auditor and was the last remaining Democrat holding statewide office in Missouri. Republicans now control all six statewide executive branch elected offices for the first time since 1932. Democrats had held a majority of those offices as recently as 2016, and last controlled all six in 2000.

Gov. Mike Parson has appointed Republican Vivek Malek, an attorney from Wildwood, to replace Fitzpatrick as state treasurer. Although Malek could have been sworn into office immediately after Fitzpatrick resigned, he plans to wait until Jan. 17 in order to circumvent a term limitation that would have restricted him to serving a maximum six years in office.

Because of a quirk in how the calendar falls, if Malek had taken office right away, his partial term would have been for a few days more than two years. Since a partial term of more than two years counts as full term under the Missouri Constitution, he would have been able to seek to election to just one full four-year term. By delaying, however, Malek’s partial term will be less than two years and won’t count toward term limits, allowing him to seek two four-year terms and serve up to 10 years total.
---
|
---
| **Net state revenue up 9.5 percent halfway through FY2023**
Net state general revenue collections were up 9.5 percent through the first six months of the 2023 fiscal year compared to the same period in FY 2022, going from $5.7 billion last year to $6.24 billion this year. Year-to-date revenue collections had been up 14.5 percent over the previous year through the first five months of FY 2023.
Net general revenue collections for December 2022 declined 9.3 percent compared to those for December 2021, going from $1.19 billion last year to $1.08 billion this year. According to the Missouri Office of Budget and Planning, however, the decline for December 2022 is due to a distribution error that artificially inflated collections for December 2021.

Although a technical error might account for the December decline, actual collections for the remaining six months of FY 2023 are expected to collapse due to an income tax cut that took effect Jan. 1 and sharply dropped Missouri’s top individual rate from 5.3 percent to 4.8 percent. Because of the sudden and massive reduction in state revenue collections, state budget officials expect overall revenue growth of just 1.4 percent by the time FY 2023 ends on June 30.
---
|
---
| **Governor seeks 8.7 percent pay hike for all state workers**
Gov. Mike Parson on Jan. 11 announced he will seek an 8.7 percent pay raise for all state government workers, with an additional $2-an-hour night shift bonus for staff at residential facilities such as prisons, veteran homes and mental health institutions. Parson said the increase is necessary to offset high inflation and help stem a recent exodus of state workers to higher-paying private sector jobs that has left the state with about 7,000 open positions.

Parson, a Republican, wants the raises to take effect as of March 1. His office estimates his pay plan will cost an additional $151.2 million, including $82.4 million in general revenue, over the final four months of the 2023 fiscal year, which ends June 30. Lawmakers must approve the spending in a supplemental appropriations bill for the raises to take effect.

Although Missouri traditionally has had a low-paid state government workforce, attracting and retaining employees became a more serious problem when private-sector salaries shot up in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic and the state began hemorrhaging workers. For FY 2022, the state initially had budgeted just a 2 percent cost of living adjustment for state workers that even didn’t kick in until halfway through the fiscal year. The state ended up providing an additional 5.5 percent boost just three months later in an effort to be competitive. However, even those bumps combined barely kept up with inflation.

Parson will announce his priorities for the FY 2024 state operating budget during the annual State of the State address, which is scheduled to begin at 3 p.m. on Jan. 18 before a joint session of the Missouri General Assembly in the House of Representatives chamber. FY 2024 begins July 1.
---
|
---

[_**SB 63**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=84522b5fec&e=a088917f89) \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions

[_**SB 64**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f419becb0b&e=a088917f89) \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees

[**SB 65**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b7345f2067&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons

[_**SB 145**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=fbe55c22dd&e=a088917f89) \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts

[_**SB 146**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=c8c56e46b3&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions

[_**SB 147**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=857a96bc01&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility

[_**SB 215**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=335ffdc3fb&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution

[**_SB 216_**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=4d85fb45ee&e=a088917f89) \- Designates "James W Brooks Memorial Highway" in St. Louis City and St. Louis County

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=9e113fb24c&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
---
|
---
| **SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES** Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2e5c540837&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5837c16a27&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.

clean_body: State auditor vows to exceed power by investigating schools | | | | | | | Capitol Report January 13, 2023 | | | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | State auditor vows to exceed power by investigating schools Shortly after being sworn in on Jan. 9, new State Auditor Scott Fitzpatrick pledged to exceed the constitutional authority of his office by investigating public school districts for allegedly teaching so-called “critical race theory.” Fitzpatrick, a Republican who had served as state treasurer since 2019, won election as auditor in November. The Missouri Constitution restricts the state auditor to auditing the finances of state agencies and local governments, including school districts. It also bars the legislature from expanding the auditor’s role, saying: “No duty shall be imposed on him by law which is not related to the supervising and auditing of the receipt and expenditure of public funds.” Critical race theory is an area of academic study taught in some law schools that examines the lingering impact of racism on institutions. It is not taught in K-12 schools in Missouri. However, conservative Republican politicians often use CRT as shorthand for any instruction or discussion of past or present racism in society. Fitzpatrick made investigating schools on the subject a central theme of his election campaign. Fitzpatrick replaces Nicole Galloway, who did not seek election to a third term as auditor and was the last remaining Democrat holding statewide office in Missouri. Republicans now control all six statewide executive branch elected offices for the first time since 1932. Democrats had held a majority of those offices as recently as 2016, and last controlled all six in 2000. Gov. Mike Parson has appointed Republican Vivek Malek, an attorney from Wildwood, to replace Fitzpatrick as state treasurer. Although Malek could have been sworn into office immediately after Fitzpatrick resigned, he plans to wait until Jan. 17 in order to circumvent a term limitation that would have restricted him to serving a maximum six years in office. Because of a quirk in how the calendar falls, if Malek had taken office right away, his partial term would have been for a few days more than two years. Since a partial term of more than two years counts as full term under the Missouri Constitution, he would have been able to seek to election to just one full four-year term. By delaying, however, Malek’s partial term will be less than two years and won’t count toward term limits, allowing him to seek two four-year terms and serve up to 10 years total. | | Net state revenue up 9.5 percent halfway through FY2023 Net state general revenue collections were up 9.5 percent through the first six months of the 2023 fiscal year compared to the same period in FY 2022, going from $5.7 billion last year to $6.24 billion this year. Year-to-date revenue collections had been up 14.5 percent over the previous year through the first five months of FY 2023. Net general revenue collections for December 2022 declined 9.3 percent compared to those for December 2021, going from $1.19 billion last year to $1.08 billion this year. According to the Missouri Office of Budget and Planning, however, the decline for December 2022 is due to a distribution error that artificially inflated collections for December 2021. Although a technical error might account for the December decline, actual collections for the remaining six months of FY 2023 are expected to collapse due to an income tax cut that took effect Jan. 1 and sharply dropped Missouri’s top individual rate from 5.3 percent to 4.8 percent. Because of the sudden and massive reduction in state revenue collections, state budget officials expect overall revenue growth of just 1.4 percent by the time FY 2023 ends on June 30. | | Governor seeks 8.7 percent pay hike for all state workers Gov. Mike Parson on Jan. 11 announced he will seek an 8.7 percent pay raise for all state government workers, with an additional $2-an-hour night shift bonus for staff at residential facilities such as prisons, veteran homes and mental health institutions. Parson said the increase is necessary to offset high inflation and help stem a recent exodus of state workers to higher-paying private sector jobs that has left the state with about 7,000 open positions. Parson, a Republican, wants the raises to take effect as of March 1. His office estimates his pay plan will cost an additional $151.2 million, including $82.4 million in general revenue, over the final four months of the 2023 fiscal year, which ends June 30. Lawmakers must approve the spending in a supplemental appropriations bill for the raises to take effect. Although Missouri traditionally has had a low-paid state government workforce, attracting and retaining employees became a more serious problem when private-sector salaries shot up in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic and the state began hemorrhaging workers. For FY 2022, the state initially had budgeted just a 2 percent cost of living adjustment for state workers that even didn’t kick in until halfway through the fiscal year. The state ended up providing an additional 5.5 percent boost just three months later in an effort to be competitive. However, even those bumps combined barely kept up with inflation. Parson will announce his priorities for the FY 2024 state operating budget during the annual State of the State address, which is scheduled to begin at 3 p.m. on Jan. 18 before a joint session of the Missouri General Assembly in the House of Representatives chamber. FY 2024 begins July 1. | | 2023 SENATE BILLS \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution \- Designates "James W Brooks Memorial Highway" in St. Louis City and St. Louis County \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession by a minor \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Specifies that the St. Louis City school board shall fill any vacancy that occurs in such school board outside of the normal election cycle \- Authorizes counties to freeze the real property assessed values of certain senior citizens | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit or call 314-531-2003. You can also contact at 314-993-2777. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST The has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call 866-211-9966. : : | | | | | | MEDICAL RESOURCES The Department of Health COVID-19 hotline is open from 8 a.m. - 10 p.m. Call 314-657-1499 with questions or concerns. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at tel:%20\(877\%20435-8411). | | | | | | RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit: As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy. Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program. Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. name: Katie Porter for Senate
subject: Be a part of our 58 Counties Campaign, Derek,
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We did the math (we have A LOT of voters to reach)
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15811%2E3422442%2ELVeIcK)
Derek,
Our goal: Winning a competitive U.S. Senate race in the most populous state in America.
Our strategy: **Launch our 58 Counties Campaign** to reach as many of California’s 26,876,800 registered voters as we can—including rural voters, first-time voters, Republicans, and Independents.
It’s pretty simple. By assigning grassroots supporters to each of California’s 58 counties, we’ll ensure we can fund organizing, advertising, and events in every part of our state.
**You’re part of the plan, Derek—see more on the whiteboard below!**
**Derek's Assignment: San Joaquin County, CA**
* There are 388,635 registered voters in San Joaquin County.
* We’re setting a goal to raise 50¢ per voter to help us hire organizers, plan local events, and start advertising.
* Doing the math...that means we need to raise **$194,317.50** to reach every voter in San Joaquin County.

**What do you say, Derek? Will you donate to help Katie reach voters in San Joaquin County?** **⇢[Make a $10 donation to reach 20 voters in San Joaquin County.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15208?refcode=EMAF13_2_SAC_20230113_V1_F&county=San&akid=15811%2E3422442%2ELVeIcK Joaquin&voters=388635&t=4)** **⇢[Make a $25 donation to reach 50 voters in San Joaquin County.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15209?refcode=EMAF13_2_SAC_20230113_V1_F&county=San&akid=15811%2E3422442%2ELVeIcK Joaquin&voters=388635&t=5)** **⇢[Make a $50 donation to reach 100 voters in San Joaquin County.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15210?refcode=EMAF13_2_SAC_20230113_V1_F&county=San&akid=15811%2E3422442%2ELVeIcK Joaquin&voters=388635&t=6)** **⇢[Make a $100 donation to reach 200 voters in San Joaquin County.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15211?refcode=EMAF13_2_SAC_20230113_V1_F&county=San&akid=15811%2E3422442%2ELVeIcK Joaquin&voters=388635&t=7)**
---
We won’t sugarcoat it: Winning a statewide race in California is _tough_.
CA has more voters than anywhere else in America. More voters to reach equals more doors to knock, more organizers to hire, more events to host, and more ads to air. All of which requires resources—as in tens of millions of dollars.
Our path to victory gets even tougher when you consider that Katie is one of the few Members of Congress who doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Banks, Big Pharma, or Big Oil.
**The only way we can beat the competition’s cash advantage is**** _full grassroots participation_****in our 58 Counties Campaign.** Remember, Katie has proven she can appeal to Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike by winning three times in a battleground district. So by refusing to write any voters off, and shoring up our support with working people everywhere from our major cities to the Valley, we’ll give Katie the edge she needs to get to the U.S. Senate.
**[We need your help in San Joaquin County. Will you chip in any amount to help reach our $194,317.50 goal?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15207?refcode=EMAF13_2_SAC_20230113_V1_F&county=San&akid=15811%2E3422442%2ELVeIcK Joaquin&voters=388635&t=8)**
Your participation is vital to ensure we can bring Katie’s message to the registered voters of San Joaquin County. Thank you for doing your part.
More soon,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF13_2_SAC_20230113_V1_F&t=9&refcode2=15811_3422442_LVeIcK&akid=15811%2E3422442%2ELVeIcK)**

subject: ALERT: Pritzker Signs Law, Expands Abortion Protections
body:
The abortion bill passed the Illinois House by a vote of 70-39, and the Illinois Senate, 41-16, leaving Republicans voiceless and irrelevant.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/bdaf062c6e45/alert-pritzker-signs-law-expands-abortion-protections?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Sign up today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

Pritzker Signs Bill, Expands Abortion Protections in Illinois, Including Gender Transitioning Care (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-bill-expands-abortion-protections-in-illinois-including-gender-transitioning-care.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-bill-expands-abortion-protections-in-illinois-including-gender-transitioning-care.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

During a late Friday morning press conference in Chicago, Democrat Gov. JB Pritzker, surrounded by legislators and abortion rights advocates, signed a bill (https://www.ilga.gov/legislation/102/HB/10200HB4664sam005.htm?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) into law that expands abortion protections in Illinois, including gender transitioning care.

The legislation is in response to the June decision when the US Supreme Court
overturned (https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/supreme-court-rules-major-case-involving-abortion-rights/story?id=85160781&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Roe v. Wade, which made abortion care a guaranteed constitutional right. The Supreme Court overturned Roe in a 5-4 decision, with Justice Samuel Alito writing the opinion (https://www.supremecourt.gov/opinions/21pdf/19-1392_6j37.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) calling Roe “egregiously wrong from the start.”

After the Supreme Court’s action in June, Gov. Pritzker issued a statement on Twitter,

“Let me be clear: even with the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade, abortion is still safe and legal in Illinois. This is a direct assault on self-determination and the right to privacy. But we cannot allow the radical right to take our power away. The fight continues.”

The new law protects Illinois providers from legal action for performing abortion procedures to out-of-state patients, and protects patients from seeking gender transitioning care such as hormone blockers, hormone replacement therapy and hormone gender confirmation surgery.

Since the overturning of Roe v. Wade, several surrounding states including Missouri, Wisconsin and Kentucky have
banned (https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2022/us/abortion-laws-roe-v-wade.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) abortions.

In a speech moments before the bill signing, Pritzker
said (https://abc7chicago.com/illinois-abortion-law-roe-v-wade-laws-bill/12697968/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“Here in Illinois, we hold certain ideals: abortion is health care. A medical decision should be made between a patient and their doctor – no one else. Last Summer, when Roe v. Wade was overturned, I made a promise that Illinois would remain a beacon of hope and an island for a reproductive justice for all who seek it. This bill fulfills that promise.”

The bill passed the Illinois House by a vote of 70-39 (https://ilga.gov/legislation/votehistory/102/house/10200HB4664sam005_01102023_011000C.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , and the Illinois Senate, 41-16 (https://ilga.gov/legislation/votehistory/102/senate/10200HB4664_01102023_001000T.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , proving yet again how irrelevant and useless Illinois Republicans have become in the General Assembly. The differences in the votes is astonishing.

During debate in the Senate, Republican State Sen. Darren Bailey
said (https://www.wbez.org/stories/pritzker-signs-assault-weapons-ban-lawmakers-shore-up-abortion-rights/28645778-9a71-4b7b-8546-5c73bc7c56aa?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“I have no words for it, other than pure evil. This is wrong. God help us.”

Unfortunately, Republicans are left voiceless and irrelevant on local and state matters in Springfield. Democrats maintain a supermajority in both the Illinois House and Illinois Senate Chambers, and they control every statewide office and the State Supreme Court by a 5-2 majority.

The Republican Party of Illinois has recently come under fire for sending out a
pro-choice mailer (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-violates-party-platform-pays-for-and-endorses-pro-choice-mailer-during-2022-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in support of Republican DuPage County Chairman candidate Greg Hart – a protege of former House Republican leader Jim Durkin, who earlier this week joined Democrats, voting in favor of the assault weapons ban (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-il-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-votes-with-democrats-to-ban-assault-weapons.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Illinois Republicans had hoped that by running a pro-choice candidate, they would have attracted more independent voters. Instead the plan backfired and Hart lost the election.

But not only is this mailer wrong, it contradicts the
Illinois Republican Party Platform (https://illinois.gop/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/2020PlatformoftheIllinoisRepublicanParty.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , which was adopted on October 3, 2020.

“We believe that our natural rights, as enshrined in the U.S. Constitution and the Declaration of Independence, begin at conception and continue until natural death.

We support a human life amendment to the federal and Illinois constitutions affirming the right to life of unborn children, and we support making clear that the Fourteenth Amendment’s protections apply to unborn children.”

The document goes on to say that,

“We advocate the overturning of Roe v. Wade”

Illinois Republican Party Chairman Don Tracy, and the seventeen members of the Republican State Central Committee have remained silent on the mailer issue, choosing not to make any public comments or statements on the matter.

Illinois Review finds this unacceptable and will continue to hold senior Illinois GOP officials accountable for their actions.

For more information, please continue to follow Illinois Review for updates.

Under Standards Imposed by the U.S. Attorney's Office - Where She Once Worked, Lightfoot Broke the Law (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/under-standards-imposed-by-the-u-s-attorneys-office-where-she-onced-worked-lightfoot-broke-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Wednesday evening, WTTW News broke a story that Mayor Lori Lightfoot’s campaign sent an email to Chicago Public Schools (CPS) teachers on their official city email addresses to encourage students to volunteer on her campaign in exchange for class credit.

Did she break the law?

Under the standard imposed by the US Attorney’s office here in Chicago – an office where the mayor worked from 1996-2002, she did.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/under-standards-imposed-by-the-u-s-attorneys-office-where-she-onced-worked-lightfoot-broke-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/under-standards-imposed-by-the-u-s-attorneys-office-where-she-onced-worked-lightfoot-broke-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Pritzker Signs Assault Weapons Ban, Warns Conservatives There Will Be Consequences for Breaking the Law (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-assault-weapons-ban-warns-conservatives-there-will-be-consequences-for-breaking-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Late Tuesday evening, Illinois became the 9th state in the nation to ban assault weapons after Gov. JB Pritzker, D held a signing ceremony at the State Capitol in Springfield. After the ceremony, Pritzker spoke to the press, where he had a stern warning for conservatives across the state: there will be consequences for not following the law. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-assault-weapons-ban-warns-conservatives-there-will-be-consequences-for-breaking-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-assault-weapons-ban-warns-conservatives-there-will-be-consequences-for-breaking-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Powerful Teachers Union that Supported Mandates, Helped Write Sex Ed Standards, Donated to Illinois Republicans (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-powerful-teachers-union-that-supported-mandates-helped-write-sex-education-standards-donated-to-illinois-republicans.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
The National Education Association – an organization whose state association in Illinois endorsed Democrat Gov. JB Pritzker for governor and Democrat Kwame Raoul for attorney general; promoted mandates during the pandemic, and helped write the controversial sex education standards, has donated more than $1.5 million to Illinois House and Senate Republicans since the start of the pandemic through their political action committee, Illinois PAC for Education (IPACE). Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-powerful-teachers-union-that-supported-mandates-helped-write-sex-education-standards-donated-to-illinois-republicans.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================

** House GOP Leader Jim Durkin Resigning, Says Trump Republicans, 2nd Amendment and Pro-Life Issues "Dragged" GOP Down in Midterms (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-resigning-says-trump-republicans-2nd-amendment-and-pro-life-issues-dragged-gop-down-in-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0a548ca14b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_13_07_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0a548ca14b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

After more than 24 years in the Illinois legislature, House Republican Minority Leader Jim Durkin is resigning his seat. In November, the day after the election, Durkin announced that he was resigning as House Minority Leader.

During the midterm election, Durkin suffered embarrassing losses, giving House Democrats once again, supermajority control in the Illinois House.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: I didn't wait a second to act on George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
If Republicans won't hold George Santos accountable, I will. |
#
---
Peter, Last Saturday morning, I proudly took my oath of office as a member of Congress. I pledged to defend the Constitution and faithfully discharge the duties of office. I take that oath very seriously. But it’s abundantly clear that [another newly-elected member](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57300605/387476283/-1043826899?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2MjcxZi04YzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSXw2tayN8QCemD6USKACC2cFS5rdb3UrOgE2zG8-S8=&emci=41092fa4-8393-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0df6271f-8c93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=13556823) cannot be trusted to faithfully discharge the duties of his office because of the egregious pattern of lies he told to get elected. **That person is Rep. George Santos (R-NY) — and I’ve spent the last week working hard to hold him accountable.** On Tuesday, my friend and colleague Rep. Ritchie Torres and I [walked into the office of Rep. Santos](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57300606/387476284/-1474117738?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2MjcxZi04YzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSXw2tayN8QCemD6USKACC2cFS5rdb3UrOgE2zG8-S8=&emci=41092fa4-8393-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0df6271f-8c93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=13556823) and handed him a copy of an official complaint that we filed with the House Ethics Committee calling for a full investigation into whether or not the highly suspicious campaign finance reports that he submitted to the FEC violated the Ethics in Government Act. _ABC 7 NY:_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57300607/387476285/1288870341?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2MjcxZi04YzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSXw2tayN8QCemD6USKACC2cFS5rdb3UrOgE2zG8-S8=)**
* * *
**The House Ethics Committee Complaint** The Ethics in Government Act requires the filing of **timely** , **accurate** , and **complete** financial disclosure reports. **It is clear that Santos has failed on all three counts.** Mr. Santos not only failed to file a **timely** disclosure report for his most recent campaign, _he failed to file a single financial disclosure report_ prior to the Republican primary for the NY-03 congressional seat on August 23, 2022, notwithstanding his status as a candidate for 19 months prior. Moreover, his own public statements have highlighted the **inaccuracy** of his filings by contradicting some information included in the 2022 financial disclosure – such as his ownership of an apartment in Rio de Janeiro – and confirming that he failed to disclose other required information. **Yet the most inexplicable and likely most significant mystery is the $700,000 he gave to his own campaign.** In 2020, Santos stated that he made a salary of $55,000 and had no assets. By 2022, Santos’s financial disclosure forms stated that he had more than $1,000,000 in assets and received a salary of $750,000 per year, all of which derived from a sudden, perplexing financial windfall related to an entity he formed _during_ his campaign. This filing is problematically **incomplete** , with key omissions that would reveal who the clients of his so-called company are — a potential violation of criminal campaign finance laws. That’s why [I called weeks ago](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57300608/387476286/967611005?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2MjcxZi04YzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSXw2tayN8QCemD6USKACC2cFS5rdb3UrOgE2zG8-S8=&emci=41092fa4-8393-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0df6271f-8c93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=13556823) for the U.S. Attorney for the Eastern District of New York to investigate these potential crimes, and why federal and state agencies have already launched their own investigations into Santos. _**WATCH**_ me break it all down with _[**Errol Louis** on **NY1’s ‘Inside City Hall’**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57300609/387476287/-1742310643?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2MjcxZi04YzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSXw2tayN8QCemD6USKACC2cFS5rdb3UrOgE2zG8-S8=&emci=41092fa4-8393-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0df6271f-8c93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=13556823)_
* * *
**The SANTOS Act** Congress has a duty to ensure its own members follow the law, for if we do not follow the laws we pass, how can we ask the American people to do so? That’s why it’s so important for the Ethics Committee to investigate Santos, and I was encouraged that Speaker Kevin McCarthy confirmed this investigation yesterday. But simply following the law should not be sufficient for members of Congress. In order to restore the public’s confidence in the institution, we must strive to be a model of integrity. **I came to Congress to strengthen our democracy and restore faith in our institutions, and we must start with our own House. That’s why I didn’t stop with an Ethics Committee complaint.** Under current election law, candidates are not prohibited from lying about key biographical information as Santos did. At a minimum, voters must have confidence that the candidates on their ballots are who they say they are. Yesterday, Rep. Torres and I introduced the _[Stop Another Non-Truthful Office Seeker (SANTOS) Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57300610/387476288/-555281656?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2MjcxZi04YzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSXw2tayN8QCemD6USKACC2cFS5rdb3UrOgE2zG8-S8=&emci=41092fa4-8393-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0df6271f-8c93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=13556823) _to ensure that no one can ever defraud voters like George Santos did. The bill would require that candidates for Congress file their education, employment history, and military service under penalty of a fine or jail time for lying. The _SANTOS Act_ should receive unanimous, bipartisan support. What possible argument is there against ensuring that voters are not defrauded by candidates? Sadly, Republican leadership has instead spent this week defending Santos, which is not surprising given that they were reportedly aware of Santos’s campaign lies and considered them to be “a running joke.” **Well, I don’t consider our free and fair elections a joke, and I’m certain you don’t either.** There are some signs of encouragement, however, as eight sitting Republican members of Congress have called for his resignation. And Santos’s local Nassau County Republican Party leader emphatically [called for his resignation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57300611/387476289/817816122?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2MjcxZi04YzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSXw2tayN8QCemD6USKACC2cFS5rdb3UrOgE2zG8-S8=&emci=41092fa4-8393-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0df6271f-8c93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=13556823), saying that they no longer “consider him one of our congresspeople” due to his campaign of lies and deception, including to the Nassau County GOP itself. **Yet Rep. Santos is defiantly refusing to resign.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57300612/387476290/1288870341?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2MjcxZi04YzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSXw2tayN8QCemD6USKACC2cFS5rdb3UrOgE2zG8-S8=)****But I won’t give up, because George Santos simply does not belong in Congress. If House Republican leadership won’t hold him accountable, I won’t wait around for them.** [I’ll continue to call out New York Republicans like Elise Stefanik](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57300613/387476291/1831386760?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2MjcxZi04YzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSXw2tayN8QCemD6USKACC2cFS5rdb3UrOgE2zG8-S8=&emci=41092fa4-8393-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0df6271f-8c93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=13556823), who was one of Rep. Santos’s biggest campaign supporters yet has remained mum about his web of lies. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57300614/387476292/1288870341?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2MjcxZi04YzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSXw2tayN8QCemD6USKACC2cFS5rdb3UrOgE2zG8-S8=)** And as I promised, I will be an unyielding voice to defend our democracy, including attacks on our free and fair elections like the one Santos perpetrated through fraud and deception. **Your support is essential to that effort, and I would be grateful if you could chip in a donation to help me hold fraudsters like Santos accountable.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57300615/387476293/1288870341?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230113_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY2MjcxZi04YzkzLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSXw2tayN8QCemD6USKACC2cFS5rdb3UrOgE2zG8-S8=)

body:
Her staff called Capitol police on me and proceeded to ignore all of my questions before they were whisked away in a private SUV. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FP7ZWnwSijV0ZkvE3UGOJqg%2FGWMPi5j67cl29K1XGoS7Vw/1/01000185ad1ce666-eda2fdd4-023e-4706-8707-2e9836d6dcdd-000000/N4thi5uhqfYOufkXBZikRhgxjGY=304) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FP7ZWnwSijV0ZkvE3UGOJqg%2FGWMPi5j67cl29K1XGoS7Vw/2/01000185ad1ce666-eda2fdd4-023e-4706-8707-2e9836d6dcdd-000000/-qO3Pi4LnhILB3QpohFMRmKFtdc=304) Dear Friend,

While I was at the Capitol this week, I confronted Democrat Congresswoman Mary Peltola who recently "defeated" Sarah Palin to become the sole congresswoman from Alaska.

Peltola used her Native American Heritage to win her race and claims that she is an advocate for Native Americans across the country . . . **UNLESS that conflicts with her political agenda and protecting the D.C. establishment.**

The explosive story I asked her about would put her in the sights of the new RINO Speaker of the House, Corrupt Kevin McCarthy.

McCarthy's family profited by accepting $7.6 million in federal contracts that were earmarked for Native American-owned, "disadvantaged" businesses.

The company, Vortex Construction, is owned by William Wages, who happens to be Kevin McCarthy's brother-in-law.

Wages claims to be Cherokee Native American, but according to tribal leader David Cornsilk, Wages isn't on the tribal rolls, and is instead part of an illegitimate group posing as Native American.

**In other words, McCarthy 's family conned their way to get their hands on lucrative federal contracts worth nearly $8 million!**

While Elizabeth Warren will forever be known as "Pocahontas", **McCarthy has earned the nickname "Chief Sticky Fingers."**

But, when I asked Congresswoman Peltola if she's willing to investigate Kevin McCarthy and his family for this financial con job, she and her staff called Capitol police on me and proceeded to ignore all of my questions before they were whisked away in a private SUV. **[Watch here.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FP7ZWnwSijV0ZkvE3UGOJqg%2FGWMPi5j67cl29K1XGoS7Vw/3/01000185ad1ce666-eda2fdd4-023e-4706-8707-2e9836d6dcdd-000000/UFqJcvjII7xBJlTvHqxbFsX-p4Q=304)**

That's our corrupt, uni-party government folks!

And I'll be working to expose their hypocrisy and fraud while I remain in D.C.

But, funds are running tight, and [**I need your help to keep going so that I can expose the uni-party.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FP7ZWnwSijV0ZkvE3UGOJqg%2FGWMPi5j67cl29K1XGoS7Vw/4/01000185ad1ce666-eda2fdd4-023e-4706-8707-2e9836d6dcdd-000000/ofOeEDLhZ7SW_tQOaRYMGgnknNY=304)

Please [**donate today to cover travel and video editing costs.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FP7ZWnwSijV0ZkvE3UGOJqg%2FGWMPi5j67cl29K1XGoS7Vw/5/01000185ad1ce666-eda2fdd4-023e-4706-8707-2e9836d6dcdd-000000/cITYSOydY8hTQ7BLEi890m_vizI=304) Every dollar helps me continue my investigative journalism so I can continue exposing and fighting the D.C. establishment.

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer
